method: Per chunk van 20 kaarten: Opus-audit script-vs-oracle + adversarial Opus-verify van elke flag. 44 lege oracle_texts vooraf gepatcht via Scryfall (bug-2681).

cards.name: Abundance
issues: Script is only {schema_version:2}; the draw-replacement effect (reveal until land/nonland) is entirely unimplemented and has no engine primitive

cards.name: Abzan Falconer
issues: Missing the static ability 'Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter has flying'
Outlast puts the +1/+1 counter on a target creature you control rather than on this creature itself
'Outlast only as a sorcery' timing restriction is not enforced (no timing gate on the activated ability)

cards.name: Angel of Serenity
issues: Exiles only one creature; missing 'up to three' count and the 'may' (optional)
Missing 'creature cards from graveyards' targeting — only battlefield creatures are exiled
exile_until_leaves returns exiled cards to the battlefield, but Angel of Serenity returns them to owners' HANDS on LTB

cards.name: Archaeomancer's Map
issues: Entire second ability missing: 'Whenever a land an opponent controls enters, if that player controls more lands than you, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield' (land_entered watcher + more-lands conditional + put_from_hand) is not implemented — the card's signature ramp engine is absent

cards.name: Astrologian's Planisphere
issues: Granted triggered ability on equipped creature not implemented: 'Whenever you cast a noncreature spell and whenever you draw your third card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature' is absent
Equipped creature becoming a Wizard (added creature type) is not implemented
Only job_select (token + attach) and equip cost are modeled — the ongoing payoff is missing

cards.name: Aurelia, the Warleader
issues: 'attacks for the first time each turn' is limited via once_per_turn on the self 'attacks' event, but once_per_turn is enforced only on watcher events — so the limiter no-ops and untap_all + extra_combat re-triggers in every extra combat, producing an unbounded infinite-combat loop.

cards.name: Bloodline Necromancer
issues: The entire ETB ability ('may return target Vampire or Wizard creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield') is not implemented — only the lifelink keyword is present

cards.name: Breath of the Sleepless
issues: Script is only {schema_version:2}; neither the 'cast Spirit spells as though they had flash' static nor the 'whenever you cast a creature spell during an opponent's turn, tap up to one target creature' trigger is implemented (and neither is expressible in the engine vocabulary)

cards.name: Bronzebeak Foragers
issues: ETB exile is restricted to target_type 'creature' but oracle exiles any 'nonland permanent'
'for each opponent, exile up to one' is not modeled as one exile per opponent (single exile_until_leaves)
The entire {X}{W} activated ability (put an exiled card with mana value X into its owner's graveyard, gain X life) is missing

cards.name: Caress of Phyrexia
issues: Missing the entire "draws three cards" clause — no draw action at all.

Recipient hardcoded to each_opponent for both lose_life and add_poison; oracle is a single "target player" (engine supports target_type 'player'). Wrong scope — hits all opponents and cannot target a chosen player.

cards.name: Chromatic Lantern
issues: The signature clause — "Lands you control have '{T}: Add one mana of any color'" (mana fixing for all your lands) — is not implemented. Only the Lantern's own {T}: add any color is present.

cards.name: Coalition Relic
issues: '{T}: Put a charge counter on this artifact' ability is entirely missing

'At the beginning of your first main phase, remove all charge counters and add one mana of any color for each removed' ramp is entirely missing — only the base '{T}: add any color' ability is scripted. Both are buildable in the engine (add_counters charge, beginning_of_main trigger, remove_counters + dynamic add_mana).

cards.name: Condescend
issues: The core 'Counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}' is entirely missing — only Scry 2 is implemented. counter{unless_pays} with a spell target exists in the engine and could model this.

cards.name: Curse of Vengeance
issues: Script is only {schema_version:2} — enchant player, the spite-counter-per-spell-cast trigger, and the loses-the-game payoff are all unimplemented; the card does nothing.

cards.name: Cut a Deal
issues: The payoff 'you draw a card for each opponent who drew' is entirely missing — script only makes each opponent draw, so the card hands pure card advantage to opponents with no benefit to the caster, inverting its intended value into a net-negative spell.

cards.name: Disorder in the Court
issues: Script only creates 2 fixed Clue tokens. The card exiles X target creatures, investigates X times (X-scaled, not 2), and returns the exiled creatures to the battlefield tapped at the next end step — none of the targeting, X-scaling, exile, or return is implemented.

cards.name: Dragon Tempest
issues: Only the flyer-gains-haste trigger is implemented; the entire second ability (Whenever a Dragon you control enters, it deals X damage to any target where X = number of Dragons you control) is missing — the card's main payoff

cards.name: Drana and Linvala
issues: 'Activated abilities of creatures your opponents control can't be activated' — this static lockdown is not implemented (no engine support for suppressing opponents' activated abilities)
'Drana and Linvala has all activated abilities of all creatures your opponents control' plus spend-mana-as-any-color is not implemented (no ability-granting-from-opponents mechanic)
flying + vigilance keywords are correct

cards.name: Drana, Liberator of Malakir
issues: Only keywords flying + first strike are present; the signature trigger (Whenever Drana deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each attacking creature you control) is entirely missing

cards.name: Emet-Selch of the Third Seat
issues: The entire second ability is missing: 'Whenever one or more opponents lose life, you may cast target instant/sorcery from your graveyard; exile it if it would go to the graveyard; once each turn.' Only the graveyard cost-reduction static is implemented (that static is correct — reduced_mana_cost.sql honors payload.from_zone='graveyard' per mig 304).

cards.name: Estinien Varlineau
issues: Re-derived against the now-populated oracle: the first ability (noncreature-spell -> +1/+1 counter + flying) is correctly modeled via spell_cast + exclude_type 'Creature'. The entire second ability is missing: 'At the beginning of your second main phase, draw X and lose X, where X = opponents dealt combat damage by Estinien or a Dragon this turn.' (Also largely unimplementable — no second-main-phase-specific event and no such count.)

cards.name: Ethereal Investigator
issues: ETB creates a fixed count:1 Clue instead of scaling to opponents; should be count:{count:'num_opponents'} (num_opponents is a supported count). Makes too few Clues in multiplayer/EDH.

Third ability missing entirely: 'Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 1/1 white flying Spirit' — no draw-count trigger encoded (engine also has no own-draw-count watcher event, so it is genuinely unimplemented).

cards.name: Ethersworn Adjudicator
issues: Destroy ability mana cost scripted {2}{W}{B} but oracle is {1}{W}{B} — overcosted by {1}.
Untap ability uses target_type 'permanent' (any permanent) instead of untapping this creature itself; should untap the source. Destroy target scope (creature/enchantment) is correct.

cards.name: Everflowing Chalice
issues: Multikicker not modeled: enters_with_counters fixed amount:1 charge counter, so it always enters as if kicked once (should be 0 with no kicks).
Mana ability adds fixed {C} amount:1 instead of scaling; should be amount {counters:'charge'} to add {C} per charge counter — as written the rock never scales.

cards.name: Fandaniel, Telophoroi Ascian
issues: The entire second ability is missing: 'At the beginning of your end step, each opponent may sacrifice a nontoken creature... Each opponent who doesn't loses 2 life for each instant and sorcery card in your graveyard.' Only the surveil-on-cast triggers exist.
The surveil-on-cast half is correct (two spell_cast triggers, controller:you, type_line Instant and Sorcery).

cards.name: Fellwar Stone
issues: The add_mana carries restriction spell_type_line/ability_source_type_line 'Dinosaur' (copy-paste error), so the produced mana can only be spent on Dinosaurs. Fellwar Stone has no restriction — it should add unrestricted mana of any color an opponent's land could produce. As written the stone yields mana that is effectively unspendable.

cards.name: Fetid Heath
issues: The filter ability '{W/B}, {T}: Add {W}{W}, {W}{B}, or {B}{B}' is entirely missing (compare Flooded Grove in the same chunk, which correctly models the analogous {G/U} filter ability with all three output variants). Only {T}: Add {C} is present, so the land can never produce colored mana — the whole reason to run it.

cards.name: Frost Titan
issues: Entire first ability missing: no becomes_target trigger with counter-unless-pays-{2}, though becomes_target and counter{unless_pays} are both supported by the engine.
The tap ability's rider 'It doesn't untap during its controller's next untap step' is not implemented — no no-untap/stun primitive exists, so it just taps normally.

cards.name: G'raha Tia, Scion Reborn
issues: Only the lifelink keyword is implemented; the entire 'Throw Wide the Gates' triggered ability (cast noncreature spell, may pay X life = mana value, create a 1/1 Hero with X +1/+1 counters, once each turn) is missing.

cards.name: Gadwick, the Wizened
issues: The ETB ability 'When Gadwick enters, draw X cards' is entirely missing, despite enters + draw{amount:'X'} being fully supported; only the blue-spell tap trigger is implemented.

cards.name: Geist of Saint Traft
issues: Angel token is created tapped but not attacking — create_token has no 'attacking' flag, so it never enters attacking as the oracle requires.
'Exile that token at end of combat' is not implemented (no cleanup_at_end_combat on create_token), so the 4/4 flyer persists permanently instead of being exiled.

cards.name: Ghostly Pilferer
issues: Script is only {schema_version:2} — empty. None of the three abilities implemented: becomes-untapped may-pay-{2}-then-draw (no becomes_untapped event exists anyway), draw when opponent casts from a non-hand zone (would need cast_from_exile watcher), and 'Discard a card: can't be blocked this turn' (grant_keyword enum has no unblockable).

cards.name: Gisela, Blade of Goldnight
issues: Only flying + first strike implemented. Both damage-replacement statics are absent: doubling damage dealt to opponents/their permanents, and preventing half (rounded up) of damage dealt to you/your permanents. Engine models no generic replacement effects, so these cannot be expressed — this is the bulk of the card.

cards.name: Godo, Bandit Warlord
issues: Attack trigger uses once_per_turn on the self event 'attacks', but fire_attack_triggers.sql never reads once_per_turn (only watcher events honor it) — so 'for the first time each turn' is not gated. Godo re-triggers on each additional combat it declares into, giving unbounded extra combats.
Untap scope wrong: card untaps Godo and all Samurai you control, but untap_all_attackers only untaps attacking creatures — it misses non-attacking Samurai and wrongly untaps non-Samurai attackers.

cards.name: Grafted Exoskeleton
issues: 'has infect' is granted via a continuous_effect type:'infect', which is outside the engine's honored keyword list (vocab: keywords outside the engine list are inert text; grant enum excludes infect) — equipped creature deals normal damage, not -1/-1 / poison; the card's core function is inert

'Whenever this Equipment becomes unattached, sacrifice that permanent' is not implemented — no becomes_unattached (or unattach) event exists in the trigger vocabulary, so the downside clause is missing

cards.name: Haunting Imitation
issues: Script is only {schema_version:2}; none of the reveal-top / copy-as-1/1-Spirit / return-if-no-creature behavior is implemented.

cards.name: Hellkite Igniter
issues: Oracle ability is a repeatable activated ability '{1}{R}: +X/+0 where X = artifacts you control'. Script models it as a free 'attacks' triggered ability that pumps once per combat — wrong ability category, no mana cost, cannot be activated at will or multiple times. Engine natively supports activated_abilities with a mana cost and a pump effect using count artifacts_you_control.

cards.name: Hraesvelgr of the First Brood
issues: The 'whenever you cast a noncreature spell' half of the trigger is entirely missing (only the enters trigger fires); it is modelable as a spell_cast watcher with exclude_type:'Creature' and was omitted.
'can't be blocked this turn' rider on the pump is missing, and grant_keyword has no unblockable — unmodelable and absent.
ward {2} has no engine support (grant_keyword excludes ward; keywords array treats it as inert text) and is absent from the script.

cards.name: Idol of Oblivion
issues: The '{T}: Draw a card' ability lacks its 'only if you created a token this turn' activation gate (no such count exists), making it an unconditional every-turn draw engine — materially stronger than the card. The {8},{T},Sacrifice token-maker ability is modeled.

cards.name: Imprisoned in the Moon
issues: Script only sets the enchanted permanent's P/T to 0/1 via set_pt, keeping all its types and abilities. It should turn the permanent into a colorless land with '{T}: Add {C}' and strip all other card types and abilities — a type-change + ability-removal lock the engine cannot express and does not attempt. The actual removal/neutralization effect is absent.

cards.name: Juri, Master of the Revue
issues: Missing the second ability: 'When Juri dies, it deals damage equal to its power to any target' — no dies trigger with deal_damage {power_of:'source'}. Engine supports it.

cards.name: Kaalia of the Vast
issues: put_from_hand filter is 'creature' instead of restricting to Angel, Demon, or Dragon creature cards.
put_from_hand cannot put the creature onto the battlefield tapped and attacking (no such params in the action), so the core attack/tempo effect is lost.
'attacks an opponent' rider not modeled (generic attacks event); put-from-hand not wrapped in a 'may' (should be optional, minor).

cards.name: Kalitas, Traitor of Ghet
issues: Missing the replacement effect: nontoken creatures opponents control that would die are not exiled and do not make 2/2 black Zombie tokens (engine has no generic replacement effects).
Activated ability's sacrifice_creature cost has no 'another Vampire or Zombie' type restriction.

cards.name: Kami of the Crescent Moon
issues: Spurious 'flying' continuous_effect — Kami has no flying.

Trigger is 'upkeep' (active player, controller-only) instead of the symmetric each-player draw step; opponents get no extra draw and the step/scope is materially wrong, and the engine has no each-player draw-step event.

cards.name: Krile Baldesion
issues: Trace Aether trigger entirely missing: script has only the lifelink keyword. The whole 'whenever you cast a noncreature spell, return target creature card with MV equal to that spell's MV from your graveyard, once per turn' ability is absent. CONFIRMED — reduces a commander to a vanilla lifelinker. (Note: even if attempted, the engine has no 'MV equal to the spell's MV' graveyard filter — only max_mana_value / max_mana_value_of:source_power — so it is only partially expressible, but nothing is scripted at all.)

cards.name: Midnight Clock
issues: 'At the beginning of each upkeep' scripted as the 'upkeep' event, which fires only on the active player's own upkeep — counter ticks only on your turns, not each player's
The twelfth-hour-counter payoff (shuffle hand+graveyard into library, draw seven, exile this) is entirely missing

cards.name: Mirage Phalanx
issues: Uses action type 'copy_self' which is not in the engine vocabulary (documented is copy_permanent) — unknown action types pass schema but no-op at runtime, so the sole ability does nothing
Soulbond not modeled — the copy trigger would fire unconditionally every combat regardless of whether the creature is paired
Ability should be granted to BOTH paired creatures, not just this one

cards.name: Mirkwood Bats
issues: The entire triggered ability is missing — 'Whenever you create or sacrifice a token, each opponent loses 1 life' is not implemented (and there is no token-created watcher event to build it); only the flying keyword is present

cards.name: Mirror Entity
issues: Script is empty ({schema_version:2}) — Changeling (all creature types) and the {X}: creatures become X/X with all creature types ability are both absent.

cards.name: Multiversal Passage
issues: The 'choose a basic land type; this land is the chosen type' clause is not implemented and the script contains no mana ability at all, so the land produces zero mana — its entire mana function is absent. Only the enters-tapped-unless-pay-2-life half is encoded.

cards.name: Naru Meha, Master Wizard
issues: The signature ETB ability (copy target instant or sorcery spell you control, may choose new targets) is entirely missing — only the Wizard anthem is scripted.

Flash is not present (and flash is outside the engine's honored keyword list, so it cannot be enforced anyway). The +1/+1 anthem for other Wizards is via a whitelisted 'pump' continuous_effect and is honored.

cards.name: Occult Epiphany
issues: X is hardcoded to 2 for both draw and discard instead of using cast-time 'X'.
Token count is fixed at 1 instead of 'for each card type among cards discarded this way' — the dynamic per-card-type count is not modeled.

cards.name: Ophiomancer
issues: Oracle says 'at the beginning of each upkeep' but the 'upkeep' event fires only for the active player, so it misses opponents' upkeeps.
The intervening-if 'if you control no Snakes' lives only in may.prompt text (honor system) — no condition object, so it is never enforced.
Wrapped in 'may' making it optional, but the ability is mandatory ('create a ... token').

cards.name: Phyresis Outbreak
issues: pump_all uses scope 'all' — the engine offers only 'all' or 'controller' scope (no opponent-only), so it also gives -1/-1 to YOUR creatures; oracle only affects creatures your opponents control
Fixed -1/-1 instead of scaling '-1/-1 for each poison counter its controller has' — power/toughness are hardcoded, so the debuff does not scale with poison counters

cards.name: Professional Face-Breaker
issues: Only menace (in engine keyword list) is implemented. The 'whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, create a Treasure' trigger is missing entirely, though the engine has a creature_damaged_player watcher event that could carry it.
The 'Sacrifice a Treasure: exile top card, may play it this turn' activated ability is missing entirely.

cards.name: Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer
issues: Only the Treasure creation on combat damage (dealt_combat_damage_to_player) is implemented; the 'exile the top card of that player's library, you may cast it until end of turn' impulse-steal is missing entirely.
Dash {1}{R} is not encoded.

cards.name: Read the Runes
issues: Only 'Draw X' is implemented. The entire downside — 'For each card drawn, discard a card unless you sacrifice a permanent' — is missing, turning a costed draw into a free Draw X.

cards.name: Reaper's Scythe
issues: The equip payoff — 'Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each soul counter and is an Assassin' — is entirely unimplemented (no continuous buff, no type-add).
Counters are added as counter_type 'generic', not tracked as soul counters, and nothing reads them, so the counters accumulate uselessly.
The end_step counter trigger uses a turn-step event which fires only for the active player — correct here since it is 'your end step' (verified, not a defect).

cards.name: Reckless Fireweaver
issues: Uses the creature_entered watcher event with a type_line:artifact filter. Per the engine's watcher list there is no artifact/permanent-entered event, and creature_entered only fires when the entering object is a creature — so only artifact CREATURES trigger. Noncreature artifacts (Treasure, mana rocks, Equipment), the card's common case, never trigger, so most artifact ETBs deal no damage.

cards.name: Rogue's Passage
issues: The {T}: Add {C} mana ability is present.

The signature '{4}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn' is completely missing. No unblockable grant is scripted and 'unblockable' is not in the grant_keyword enum nor modeled as a continuous effect, so the card's defining ability is unimplemented and inexpressible.

cards.name: Ruinous Ultimatum
issues: Confirmed against apply_triggered_ability_effects.sql: with no `types` array / `exclude_type` / `min_power`, destroy_all falls through to destroy_all_creatures — it destroys ONLY opponents' creatures. Artifacts, enchantments, and planeswalkers your opponents control are silently NOT destroyed, so a premium 'destroy all nonland permanents' wipe is reduced to a creatures-only wipe.
Lands are correctly untouched (no over-destruction), and opponent-controlled creatures are correctly destroyed; the defect is purely under-destruction of the three noncreature nonland types.

cards.name: Scavenging Ooze
issues: Only the exile is implemented. The entire payoff — 'if it was a creature card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and you gain 1 life' — is missing; exile_from_graveyard (schema line 165) takes only type_line and has no creature rider, so the card's defining grow/lifegain engine is absent.

cards.name: Scion of Calamity
issues: Myriad is entirely unimplemented (no myriad action) even though 'myriad' is a supported action type — the token-copy-per-opponent attack is absent.

Destroy targets any opponent's artifact/enchantment (controller:'opponent') rather than being restricted to the specific player it dealt combat damage to (destroy target_filter cannot bind to the triggering player).
destroy_up_to is declinable, but the oracle 'destroy target' is mandatory when a legal target exists.

cards.name: Shared Animosity
issues: Trigger fires correctly, but the pump amount uses count 'shared_type_attackers', which is not in the engine's CountAmount enum; it resolves to nothing, so the +1/+0-per-shared-type buff (the card's entire payload) silently does nothing.

cards.name: Sydri, Galvanic Genius
issues: Entire '{U}: target noncreature artifact becomes an artifact creature with P/T equal to its mana value' ability is missing (note: even animate has no mana_value P/T amount, so it is only approximable)
The {W}{B} ability restricts target_controller to 'you', but oracle targets any artifact creature regardless of controller
The {W}{B} grant_keyword target_type is 'creature' with no filter requiring an artifact creature — over-broad target

cards.name: Tataru Taru
issues: ETB only implements 'you draw a card'; the 'target opponent may draw a card' clause is missing entirely.

The 'Scions' Secretary' ability is unimplemented: create a tapped Treasure whenever an opponent draws a card. This is also not implementable in the engine — there is no card-draw watcher event and no per-player 'not that player's turn' gate — so no trigger, life-timing check, tapped Treasure, or once-per-turn limit exists.

cards.name: Thancred Waters
issues: Entire ETB Royal Guard ability missing (grant another target legendary permanent you control indestructible for as long as you control Thancred)
Flash keyword absent (not even present as inert text); cannot be cast at instant speed

cards.name: The Mending of Dominaria
issues: Not built as a saga despite saga_chapters support: uses a plain ETB trigger with no lore counters, no chapter progression, and never sacrifices after III
Chapter II (repeat of mill 2 + return creature) never fires
Chapter III missing entirely: return all land cards from graveyard to battlefield, then shuffle graveyard into library
'you may return a creature' scripted as a forced return_from_graveyard, not optional

cards.name: Thundermaw Hellkite
issues: ETB trigger entirely missing: 'deals 1 damage to each creature with flying your opponents control. Tap those creatures.' Only the flying/haste keywords are implemented.

cards.name: Together Forever
issues: Support 2 mis-implemented: script puts 2 +1/+1 counters on a single 'you'-controlled target instead of 1 counter on each of up to two target creatures (any controller).
Entire activated ability missing: '{1}: Choose target creature with a counter on it. When that creature dies this turn, return that card to its owner's hand.'

cards.name: Torrential Gearhulk
issues: ETB ability entirely missing: 'you may cast target instant card from your graveyard without paying its mana cost. If that spell would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead.' Only the Flash keyword is implemented.

cards.name: Transpose
issues: Conditional token creation missing: 'If this spell was cast from your hand, create a 0/1 black Wizard creature token' with its noncreature-spell damage trigger.
Rebound not implemented (no engine support); the spell simply resolves without exiling for a next-upkeep recast.

cards.name: Trial // Error
issues: Trial half entirely missing: 'Return all creatures blocking or blocked by target creature to their owner's hand.'
Error half counters any spell — the 'multicolored' restriction is not enforced (target_type: spell with no color filter), so it is broader than the card allows.

cards.name: Trinket Mage
issues: The 'with mana value 1 or less' restriction is not enforced (search_library filter has no mana-value field, only type_line: artifact), so it can tutor any artifact regardless of mana value — a significant power increase.

cards.name: Trove Warden
issues: Landfall trigger missing: 'Whenever a land you control enters, exile target permanent card MV<=3 from your graveyard' is not implemented (land_entered watcher exists but is unused).
Dies trigger missing: 'put each permanent card exiled with it onto the battlefield under owner's control' is not implemented.
Only the vigilance keyword is scripted; both signature abilities are absent.

cards.name: Tuskguard Captain
issues: Static ability missing: 'Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter has trample' is not implemented.
Outlast counter uses target_type creature / target_controller you, so it targets any creature you control instead of putting the counter (non-targeted) on itself.
Sorcery-speed timing restriction ('Outlast only as a sorcery') is not enforced (timing field is available in vocab but unused).

cards.name: Twilight Prophet
issues: Only flying is scripted.
Ascend / city's blessing mechanic is not implemented (no engine support).
Upkeep ability missing entirely: reveal top card, put into hand, each opponent loses X and you gain X = its mana value.

cards.name: Urianger Augurelt
issues: Gain-life trigger only covers cast_from_exile; the 'play a land from exile' half is not implemented.
Draw Arcanum activated ability ({T}: look at top card, may exile face down) is missing.
Play Arcanum activated ability ({T}: play exiled cards this turn, spells cost {2} less) is missing.

cards.name: Vampire Nocturnus
issues: The 'top card of your library is black' condition is passed via a loose payload key (condition_top_card_color) with no engine handling, so it is not enforced — Vampires get +2/+1 and flying unconditionally (materially too strong).
'Play with the top card of your library revealed' is not modeled.

cards.name: Vandalblast
issues: Overload {4}{R} mode (change 'target' to 'each', destroying every artifact you don't control) is not implemented; only the single-target base mode exists, and overload is the card's primary Commander use.

cards.name: White Auracite
issues: ETB 'exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this artifact leaves the battlefield' is entirely missing — only the {T}: Add {W} mana ability is scripted, and the engine supports exile_until_leaves, so the primary removal effect is an omission, not an engine limit.

cards.name: Wildborn Preserver
issues: The triggered ability 'Whenever another non-Human creature you control enters, you may pay {X}. When you do, put X +1/+1 counters on this creature' is entirely unimplemented — the card's core engine.
Flash keyword is absent (only Reach is scripted; flash is not engine-modelable regardless).

cards.name: Wurmquake
issues: Token is a fixed named token, not X/X where X = mana spent to cast (no engine amount exists for 'mana spent'; 'X' only covers {X}-cost spells). Toxic 1 is also not encoded (toxic is not in the engine keyword list).
'For each opponent with 3+ poison' is modeled as a single conditional that creates exactly one extra token when any opponent qualifies, not one token per qualifying opponent.
Flashback {8}{G}{G} is entirely absent from the script (schema supports a flashback field).

cards.name: Abrupt Decay
issues: 'with mana value 3 or less' restriction is not enforced — plain destroy on nonland_permanent has no mana-value target filter, so it can destroy any nonland permanent

cards.name: Absorb
issues: 'You gain 3 life' clause is missing — only the counter is implemented

cards.name: Acidic Slime
issues: ETB destroys only artifact or enchantment; the 'or land' option is unreachable (no 'land' target type, and destroy has no type_line path)

cards.name: Admonition Angel
issues: Target scope too narrow: exiles a creature, but oracle allows any nonland permanent
target_controller 'opponent' restricts to opponents' permanents; oracle allows any nonland permanent other than itself
The 'may' (optional) on the landfall exile is not modeled

cards.name: Akroma's Will
issues: Mode 2 is missing 'protection from each color' — grant_keyword_all has no protection support, so only indestructible + lifelink are granted

cards.name: Alisaie Leveilleur
issues: Dualcast reduction uses a cost_reduction continuous_effect with an undocumented {amount, nth_spell} payload that no known engine reader consumes; 'second spell each turn costs {2} less' is likely unimplemented
Partner-with is modeled as an auto search_library to the controller's own hand, not optional ('may') and not 'target player'

cards.name: An Offer You Can't Refuse
issues: 'noncreature' restriction on the countered spell is not enforced (target_type 'spell' allows any spell)
Missing 'Its controller creates two Treasure tokens' — counter action cannot grant tokens to the opponent

cards.name: Ancient Excavation
issues: Discard is hardcoded to 2 instead of 'a card for each card drawn this way' (should equal cards drawn)
cycling '{2}' models generic cycling (draw), but the card has basic LANDcycling (search a basic land to hand)

cards.name: Angrath's Rampage
issues: Creature mode has no type filter, so the opponent can sacrifice any permanent (e.g. a land or token) instead of a creature, dodging the removal
'Target player' is modeled as who:'opponent' edict rather than a chosen target player

cards.name: Animate Dead
issues: Enchanted creature gets -1/-0 is not implemented (no continuous effect)

'When this Aura leaves the battlefield, that creature's controller sacrifices it' drawback is not implemented — modeled as a one-shot reanimation spell, so the Aura never lives on the battlefield and there is no leaves-battlefield sacrifice tie

cards.name: Arbor Elf
issues: target_type is 'permanent' with no filter — can untap ANY tapped permanent rather than only a Forest; engine has no 'land' target type and untap exposes only exclude_type_line (no positive Forest filter), so the scope is materially broader

cards.name: Ash Barrens
issues: Basic landcycling {1} ({1}, discard this card: search library for a basic land to hand) is not implemented — only the {T}: Add {C} mana ability is present

cards.name: Authority of the Consuls
issues: Static replacement 'Creatures your opponents control enter tapped' is not implemented — enters_tapped only affects the source permanent and there is no engine action to tap opponents' incoming creatures; only the gain-1-life trigger is encoded.

cards.name: Bane of Progress
issues: Missing 'Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature for each permanent destroyed this way' — only destroy_all is encoded; the self-growth clause is absent (and no destroyed-this-way count exists to encode it).

cards.name: Banishing Light
issues: Target narrowed to target_type 'creature'; oracle allows any target nonland permanent. The 'nonland_permanent' target type exists and should be used — as written it cannot exile artifacts, enchantments, or planeswalkers.

cards.name: Baron Bertram Graywater
issues: Missing the entire first ability: 'Whenever one or more tokens you control enter, create a 1/1 black Vampire Rogue with lifelink (once each turn)' — not encoded. The two activated {1}{B}+sacrifice→draw abilities correctly model 'Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Draw a card.'

cards.name: Beacon of Unrest
issues: Missing 'Shuffle Beacon of Unrest into its owner's library' — the shuffle_self_into_library recursion clause is not encoded, so the card would go to the graveyard instead. The reanimation half (return_from_graveyard, all_graveyards, artifact/creature) is correct.

cards.name: Beanstalk Giant
issues: Adventure half (Sorcery: search library for a basic land, put onto battlefield, shuffle) is entirely absent — the engine supports an adventure block but the script has only the creature-face CDA, so the ramp mode cannot be cast

cards.name: Bedevil
issues: target_type is 'permanent', broader than 'artifact, creature, or planeswalker' — it illegally allows destroying lands, enchantments and battles (no single engine target type covers exactly A/C/PW)

cards.name: Benevolent Offering
issues: The chosen opponent does not also create three 1/1 Spirit tokens — only 'you' create them
The chosen opponent does not gain 2 life per their creatures — only your life gain (creatures_you_control x2) is implemented

cards.name: Bituminous Blast
issues: Cascade is not implemented (no cascade/discover-equivalent in the script); only the 4 damage to target creature is encoded

cards.name: Blasphemous Act
issues: The '{1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield' cost reduction is not implemented — cost_reduction.amount is a fixed positive integer in the schema and cannot express per-creature scaling, so the wipe only works at full cost

cards.name: Blink of an Eye
issues: Kicker {1}{U} is not implemented (no kicker cost defined, though the engine supports a kicker flag), so it cannot be kicked
The 'if this spell was kicked, draw a card' rider is missing (no conditional on the 'kicked' counter)

cards.name: Blinkmoth Urn
issues: beginning_of_main fires only for the active player's own permanents, so it never fires on other players' main phases — the defining symmetric 'each player's' behavior is lost
beginning_of_main fires on BOTH of the controller's main phases rather than only the first main phase, over-generating mana
The intervening 'if this artifact is untapped' condition is not modeled — mana is added even when Blinkmoth Urn is tapped

cards.name: Blood Artist
issues: Uses recipient each_opponent, draining every opponent 1 life, whereas the card targets a single chosen player — a material scope increase in multiplayer/Commander (identical only in 1v1)

cards.name: Bloodline Keeper
issues: Missing the {B} transform ability (and its 'control five or more Vampires' activation gate) — no transform action encoded (transform is also unsupported by the engine)
Missing the entire back face: flying, the 'Other Vampire creatures you control get +2/+2' anthem, and its own {T} token ability

cards.name: Blue Mage's Cane
issues: Missing 'is a Wizard in addition to its other types' type-addition on equipped creature
Missing the granted attack-triggered ability: exile up to one target instant/sorcery from defending player's graveyard, copy it, and allow casting the copy for {3}

cards.name: Blue Sun's Zenith
issues: 'Target player' not modeled — draw defaults to controller, so it can't be aimed at an opponent (deck-out plan)
Missing 'Shuffle Blue Sun's Zenith into its owner's library' — it goes to graveyard instead of becoming reusable

cards.name: Bone Shredder
issues: Missing Echo {2}{B} — no upkeep sacrifice-unless-pay drawback is enforced (Echo is unsupported by the engine), making the card strictly better than printed
destroy targets any creature ('target_type':'creature') instead of restricting to nonartifact, nonblack creatures (the destroy action supports exclude_type_line but it is unused)

cards.name: Boreas Charger
issues: Always fetches exactly 1 Plains instead of a number equal to the land difference vs a chosen opponent
Missing the 'put one onto the battlefield tapped and the rest into your hand' split — only the single battlefield land is delivered
No 'choose an opponent who controls more lands than you' gate/comparison is enforced

cards.name: Boros Garrison
issues: Oracle 'return a land you control' is mandatory, but bounce_up_to is declinable ('up to'), so the card's drawback can be skipped entirely

cards.name: Breya, Etherium Shaper
issues: Mode 1 uses recipient each_opponent (3 damage to every opponent) instead of dealing 3 to a single target player or planeswalker
Mode 2 uses destroy_up_to (declinable destroy that bypasses toughness/indestructible) instead of granting -4/-4 until end of turn to a required target creature

cards.name: Bygone Bishop
issues: The 'mana value 3 or less' gate is not enforced — the spell_cast filter supports only min_mana_value, not a max, so it investigates on every creature spell you cast regardless of mana value

cards.name: Canyon Slough
issues: Cycling {2} is not implemented (no cycling field on the script, though the schema supports one); only enters-tapped and the mana abilities are present

cards.name: Cavern of Souls
issues: The second mana ability adds unrestricted "any" color with no restriction object — oracle limits that mana to casting a creature spell of the chosen type; not enforced (add_mana.restriction available but unused).
The "and that spell can't be countered" clause is not implemented.

cards.name: Champions from Beyond
issues: The "Full Party" ability (attack with eight or more creatures → those creatures get +4/+4 until end of turn) is entirely absent from the script.
ETB uses create_token count "X", but this enchantment has no {X} in its cost and an ETB trigger has no cast-time X, so X resolves to 0 — no tokens are created.

cards.name: Chart a Course
issues: The discard is unconditional; the "unless you attacked this turn" gate is not implemented (no attacked-this-turn count exists), so the caster always discards even after attacking.

cards.name: Chief Engineer
issues: Convoke is approximated as an automatic flat {1} cost reduction on artifact spells. Real convoke lets you tap creatures to pay {1}/colored mana each (variable, potentially much more than 1) — none of that tapping mechanic is modeled.

cards.name: Compulsive Research
issues: 'Target player' is not implemented — draw (no recipient) and discard (who:'you') both default to the controller, wrong when targeting an opponent
'discards two cards unless they discard a land card' — the discard-one-land alternative is not modeled; it always discards two.

cards.name: Concealed Courtyard
issues: 'This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands' is entirely absent (no enters_tapped flag) — the land always enters untapped. The engine's enters_tapped.unless.count gate only supports a '>= at_least' comparison, so this 'two or fewer' (at-most) condition is not cleanly expressible anyway. Mana abilities W/B are correct.

cards.name: Condemn
issues: Uses shuffle_into_library instead of putting the card on the bottom of its owner's library (random position vs bottom; engine has no bottom-of-library action)
'target attacking creature' restriction is not enforced — target_type:'creature' makes any creature targetable
'Its controller gains life equal to its toughness' is not implemented (shuffle_into_library has no lifegain rider).

cards.name: Contaminant Grafter
issues: 'toxic 1' is not an engine-honored keyword — scripted as an unknown continuous_effect type 'toxic', so it is inert and the creature deals no poison itself

Combat-damage proliferate trigger uses dealt_combat_damage_to_player (fires only when this creature connects); oracle is 'one or more creatures you control deal combat damage' — should use the creature_damaged_player watcher with controller:'you' filter. Scope too narrow

Corrupted end-step ability omits 'then you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield' (only the draw is implemented). Note: proliferate DOES advance poison counters here (proliferate_bag increments all counter kinds on cards and players), and the opponent_poison_counters>=3 gate is correctly effect-level enforced.

cards.name: Costly Plunder
issues: Additional-cost sacrifice filter is type_line 'creature' only; the card allows sacrificing an artifact OR a creature, so an artifact (e.g. a Treasure) cannot be paid — the card is uncastable when you control artifacts but no creatures.

cards.name: Counterflux
issues: counter uses inline target_type 'spell' with no controller restriction; card reads 'target spell you don't control', so as scripted it can target your own spells.
Overload {1}{U}{U}{R} alternative cost (counter each spell you don't control) is entirely unimplemented — no modal/alt-cost representation exists.

cards.name: Coveted Jewel
issues: The third ability is missing: 'Whenever one or more creatures an opponent controls attack you and aren't blocked, that player draws three cards and gains control of this artifact. Untap it.' Only the ETB draw-3 and the {T}: add three mana ability are scripted, making the card strictly stronger than printed.

cards.name: Crush Contraband
issues: Modes use destroy_up_to but the card EXILES target artifact/enchantment — destroy vs exile is materially different (indestructible, regeneration, graveyard recursion).
Card is 'Choose one or both' but the script is a plain choose_one (no choose_up_to), so only one mode ever resolves — you can never exile both an artifact and an enchantment.

cards.name: Custodi Soulbinders
issues: enters_with_counters.amount is hardcoded to 2 instead of the dynamic count of other creatures on the battlefield (engine supports {count: creatures_on_battlefield}); enters with the wrong number of +1/+1 counters in essentially every game.

cards.name: Custodi Squire
issues: The 'will of the council' vote is not modeled (engine has no voting except vote_wild_free) — script just returns one graveyard card via return_from_graveyard count:1.
Cannot return multiple cards tied for most votes (fixed count 1); card selection is a plain pick rather than a voted outcome.

cards.name: Cyclonic Rift
issues: Overload {6}{U} is not implemented — the signature one-sided mass bounce is absent; only the single-target nonland bounce (which is correctly scoped to permanents you don't control) works.

cards.name: Damnable Pact
issues: No target player is defined — draw X (default recipient) and lose_life X are both pinned to the controller, so it can never be aimed at an opponent.

cards.name: Daretti, Scrap Savant
issues: −10 ultimate (emblem) is missing — engine has no emblem support, so this loyalty ability is absent entirely.
+2 is scripted as fixed discard 2 / draw 2 rather than 'discard UP TO two, then draw THAT MANY' — with fewer than two cards it forces the wrong count and draw is not tied to the number discarded.

cards.name: Darksteel Mutation
issues: 'loses all other abilities, card types, and creature types' is not implemented — set_pt 0/1 + indestructible are applied, but the enchanted creature keeps all abilities, so it does not neutralize a commander's activated/triggered abilities (the card's main purpose).
Does not change the creature into an Insect artifact creature (type change unmodeled — minor).

cards.name: Deadly Dispute
issues: Additional-cost sacrifice filter is restricted to type_line 'creature' — oracle allows sacrificing an artifact OR a creature, so you cannot pay the cost with a Treasure/artifact, breaking the card's most common line of play.

cards.name: Deadly Rollick
issues: 'If you control a commander, you may cast this spell without paying its mana cost' (the free-cast alternative cost) is not implemented — only the base exile-target-creature works, so it always costs full mana.

cards.name: Deadly Tempest
issues: The rider 'Each player loses life equal to the number of creatures they controlled that were destroyed this way' is missing — script only does destroy_all.

cards.name: Deadpool, Trading Card
issues: ETB "you may exchange his text box and another creature's" is unimplemented and has no engine equivalent. Upkeep lose-3 and {3},Sac edict-draw are both correct.

cards.name: Deathgorge Scavenger
issues: exile_from_any_graveyard supports gain_if_creature and pump_if_noncreature riders, but both are unset: the "gain 2 life if a creature card is exiled" and "+1/+1 until end of turn if a noncreature card is exiled" clauses are missing. Both enter and attacks triggers are wired correctly.

cards.name: Demolition Field
issues: destroy_up_to filter is type_line "land" with no nonbasic restriction (engine filter can't express nonbasic), so opponent basics can be targeted — wrong scope.
"That land's controller may search their library for a basic land" is not implemented.
destroy_up_to is declinable while the oracle destroy is mandatory (minor).

cards.name: Despark
issues: The "mana value 4 or greater" restriction is not enforced — the script exiles any nonland_permanent regardless of mana value, so it can hit low-cost permanents it should not. (Targeting nonland_permanent instead of any permanent is fine: lands are always MV 0 and never legal targets.)

cards.name: Dig Through Time
issues: look_top 7, put 2 to hand, rest to bottom is correct. Delve (exile graveyard cards to pay {1} each) is not implemented — the spell always costs full price.

cards.name: Disciple of the Vault
issues: Trigger event is creature_died, which fires only when a creature dies — noncreature artifacts (the card's primary use) hitting the graveyard do NOT trigger it, and no engine watcher event captures "any artifact put into a graveyard from the battlefield."
choose_player forces target selection, so the oracle's "you may" is not honored (minor — always beneficial, no reason to decline).

cards.name: Dispeller's Capsule
issues: Mana cost scripted as {W} but oracle is {2}{W} — activation is 2 generic mana too cheap
Missing the {T} (tap_self) cost (low impact since the artifact is sacrificed as part of the cost)

cards.name: Disturbed Burial
issues: Buyback {3} is not implemented — no engine buyback/pay-and-return mechanic; the spell always goes to the graveyard (base return-to-hand works)

cards.name: Donal, Herald of Wings
issues: 'nonlegendary' restriction not enforced — no legendary-exclusion field exists in the watcher filter set, so it would also copy legendary flying creature spells
The copy's modification (a 1/1 Spirit in addition to its other types) is not modeled — copy_permanent does not model added types or the 1/1 P/T override
'you may copy it' choice not modeled — copy_permanent has no optional/may (low impact)

cards.name: Dovin's Veto
issues: Counter targets any spell (target_type 'spell'); the 'noncreature' restriction is not enforced, so it can illegally counter creature spells. cant_be_countered is correct.

cards.name: Dovin, Grand Arbiter
issues: +1 ability has empty effects[] — the delayed 'creature deals combat damage to a player -> add loyalty counter' trigger is completely inert
-7 ultimate is reduced to a flat 'draw 3' — the look-at-top-ten / select-three / bottom-rest selection is not modeled

cards.name: Dread Wanderer
issues: 'Activate only as a sorcery' timing restriction is not set (no timing:'sorcery' gate)
'only if you have one or fewer cards in hand' is not enforced — activated-ability condition supports only at_least, not at_most on cards_in_hand
Recursion uses a filter (Zombie, max_mana_value 1) rather than returning this specific card — could return a different qualifying Zombie in the graveyard

cards.name: Dream Fracture
issues: Missing 'Its controller draws a card' rider on the counter
Missing the final 'Draw a card' for the caster

cards.name: Drogskol Captain
issues: The +1/+1 anthem for other Spirits is implemented (exclude_source + creature_type Spirit), but the 'and have hexproof' grant for other Spirit creatures is missing

cards.name: Drogskol Reinforcements
issues: Melee is scripted as a flat +1/+1 on attack rather than +1/+1 per opponent you attacked this combat (wrong in multiplayer/Commander)
'Other Spirits you control have melee' is not implemented
'Prevent all noncombat damage that would be dealt to Spirits you control' is not implemented (prevent_damage only covers damage to you)

cards.name: Drover of the Mighty
issues: Missing the static '+2/+2 as long as you control a Dinosaur' buff — script only encodes the mana ability, so the creature stays 1/1 instead of 3/3 with a Dinosaur in play.

cards.name: Duplicant
issues: Missing the entire static ability 'has the power, toughness, and creature types of the last creature card exiled with it' — the exiled creature's body is never copied, so Duplicant stays a vanilla 2/4.
Exile target lacks the nontoken restriction (target_type 'creature' with no nontoken filter), so token creatures can be targeted.

cards.name: Dusk Legion Sergeant
issues: Only the Menace keyword is implemented; the activated ability '{1}{B}, Sacrifice this creature: Each nontoken Vampire creature you control gains persist until end of turn' is entirely absent (persist is also outside the grant_keyword enum).

cards.name: Dwynen, Gilt-Leaf Daen
issues: Attack trigger uses the creature_attacks watcher filtered to your Elves and gains 1 per triggering Elf, instead of firing once when Dwynen attacks and gaining 1 per attacking Elf — so it wrongly fires (and gains life) when other Elves attack while Dwynen stays back, and does not require Dwynen to be attacking.

cards.name: Echoing Assault
issues: The copy trigger fires per attacking nontoken creature you control (creature_attacks watcher) and copies each one, whereas the oracle triggers once per attacked player and lets you choose a single target attacking creature — so the script over-produces token copies of every attacking nontoken creature.
Token 'sacrifice at the beginning of the next end step' is approximated via except.cleanup_at_end_step.

cards.name: Echoing Truth
issues: Bounces only the single targeted nonland permanent; the defining clause 'and all other permanents with the same name' is not implemented (no name-matched bounce action exists), so it can't sweep token swarms.

cards.name: Edgar Markov
issues: Eminence should trigger while Edgar is in the command zone, but the engine only fires card triggers from the battlefield and the spell_cast trigger has no command-zone provisioning, so token generation only works once Edgar is on the battlefield.

cards.name: Elenda, the Dusk Rose
issues: Missing the death payoff 'When Elenda dies, create X 1/1 white Vampire creature tokens with lifelink, where X is Elenda's power' — no dies trigger is scripted. Only lifelink and the counter-on-death growth are implemented.

cards.name: Elite Scaleguard
issues: Missing the second ability entirely: 'Whenever a creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it attacks, tap target creature defending player controls.'
Bolster is approximated as a targeted add_counters on any creature you control rather than auto-selecting the creature with least toughness.

cards.name: Elturel Survivors
issues: Missing the static combat buff 'As long as this creature is attacking, it gets +X/+0, where X is the number of lands defending player controls.' Only trample and myriad are implemented.

cards.name: Elvish Archdruid
issues: Missing the scaling mana ability '{T}: Add {G} for each Elf you control' — the script encodes only the Elf anthem and no mana ability at all, so this ramp is entirely absent. (It is encodable via add_mana with a CountAmount, so this is a scripting omission, not an engine limit.)

cards.name: Embodiment of Insight
issues: Static anthem 'Land creatures you control have vigilance' is entirely missing — the only continuous effect is vigilance on the source itself

Landfall animate targets target_type 'permanent' with target_controller 'you' and no land restriction (animate cannot filter to land), so it can turn any permanent you control into a 3/3, not just a land
The 'you may' optionality of the landfall trigger is not modeled (the animate is forced)

cards.name: Emeria Shepherd
issues: The Plains rider ('If that land is a Plains, you may return that nonland permanent card to the battlefield instead') is entirely missing — the script only returns to hand
The 'you may' optionality of the landfall trigger is not modeled (the return is forced)

cards.name: Essence Scatter
issues: counter uses target_type 'spell' with no creature restriction (the counter action's target_type is a bare literal 'spell' with no type filter available), so it can counter any spell instead of only creature spells — the card is strictly more permissive than printed

cards.name: Etched Oracle
issues: Sunburst is hardcoded to enters_with_counters amount 4 instead of one +1/+1 counter per color of mana spent (0-4), so it always enters with the max and guarantees the draw ability is usable
The activated ability draws for the controller (draw recipients are fixed, non-targetable) instead of 'target player draws three cards'

cards.name: Exclude
issues: Missing 'Draw a card.' — the cantrip half is not implemented.
counter target_type 'spell' counters any spell instead of restricting to creature spells (over-permissive; engine has no creature-spell counter filter, but the deviation is real).

cards.name: Expand the Sphere
issues: look_top has no picks/min_picks, so it does not cap lands at 'up to two' — could put every land card among the six onto the battlefield.
Lands not entered tapped (look_top to:battlefield has no tapped flag) — they enter untapped, a real advantage; engine limitation.
Proliferate fires once unconditionally instead of (2 − lands put onto battlefield) times; wrong count.

cards.name: Exsanguinate
issues: gain_life is a flat 'X' but should equal total life lost = X × number of opponents; undercounts lifegain in multiplayer/EDH (correct only in 1v1).

cards.name: Eye of Nidhogg
issues: Enchanted creature is not made black or a Dragon (no colors/type continuous effect) — matters for protection, tribal, etc.
'is goaded' not applied — the forced-attack / can't-attack-you effect is missing. Base 4/2, flying, deathtouch and the dies→return-to-hand trigger are correct.

cards.name: Ezuri, Renegade Leader
issues: '{G}: Regenerate another target Elf' ability missing entirely (engine has no regenerate action; could be approximated but is currently absent). The overload +3/+3 and trample ability is correct.

cards.name: Fact or Fiction
issues: Pile-splitting is unmodellable in this engine (vocab §5); scripted as surveil 5 + draw 2, which approximates card selection plus advantage but removes the opponent's pile choice and fixes hand gain at 2. A deliberate approximation of an unsupported mechanic rather than simply wrong.

cards.name: Faerie Artisans
issues: copy_permanent does not add the 'artifact' type to the token (engine copy effects don't model added types) — minor.
Missing 'Then exile all other tokens created with this creature' — previous copies are never exiled, so copies accumulate, making the card materially stronger than oracle.

cards.name: Far Wanderings
issues: Threshold clause missing: with 7+ cards in graveyard it should search for up to THREE basic lands instead of one (modelable via conditional {count:cards_in_graveyard, at_least:7} + search count:3). Script only ever fetches one.

cards.name: Feed the Infection
issues: Corrupted clause is a multiplayer approximation: opponent_poison_counters resolves to the HIGHEST poison total among opponents (resolve_count_amount.sql:158), so the single conditional gate + each_opponent recipient makes ALL opponents lose 3 life (or none) based on that one max, not per-opponent. Correct only in 1v1; wrong in multiplayer, where oracle applies the loss individually to each opponent with 3+ poison.

cards.name: Fell the Mighty
issues: The card's target-relative threshold (destroy all creatures with power GREATER than a chosen target creature's power) is approximated as a fixed destroy_all min_power:4 with no target. This is a deliberate, engine-documented approximation (mig 281), NOT a copy-paste error or broken card: min_power IS a supported destroy_all field and it destroys all non-indestructible creatures with power >= 4. Real deviations: you cannot choose/aim the threshold, and it uses >= rather than the oracle's strict > . Auditor's 'wrong/high' overstated; the card functions as a themed board wipe.

cards.name: Finale of Revelation
issues: The X>=10 alternate mode is missing: shuffle graveyard into library, draw X, untap up to five lands, and no maximum hand size for the rest of the game. Base 'Draw X' works for X<10.
The self-exile ('Exile Finale of Revelation') on resolution is not modeled (minor).

cards.name: Flood of Tears
issues: The gate is not enforced: put_from_hand fires unconditionally, but oracle only permits putting a permanent from hand if you returned four or more nontoken permanents you control this way. Script lets you cheat in a permanent regardless of how many were bounced.
The put is also a 'may' (optional) but the script performs it as a mandatory step, so you can be forced to put a permanent onto the battlefield.

cards.name: Frantic Search
issues: Untap uses target_type 'permanent' with fixed count 3; engine has no 'land' target type (vocab §1), so oracle's land restriction can't be honored — it can untap any permanent.
targets:3 is a fixed count with no 'up to' declinability, so the 'up to three' (fewer than 3) flexibility is lost and the spell can't resolve with under 3 targets.

cards.name: From Under the Floorboards
issues: Madness {X}{B}{B} alternative casting has no engine support and is not modeled.
The 'if madness cost was paid, create X tokens and gain X life instead' variant is absent — only the fixed 3-token / 3-life hardcast path is implemented.

cards.name: Geode Rager
issues: Wrong scope: oracle goads EACH creature a target player controls, but the script goads a single target creature an opponent controls (no goad-all primitive exists).
goad only enforces the 'can't attack the goader' half per engine; the 'attacks each combat if able' compulsion is not enforced (engine-wide goad limitation).

cards.name: Geth's Summons
issues: Corrupted clause entirely missing: for each opponent with 3+ poison counters, put up to one target creature card from THAT player's graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. Script only implements base reanimation (return_from_graveyard, own graveyard).

cards.name: Glissa's Retriever
issues: 'Can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less' not implemented (block restrictions of this kind are not modelled by the engine).
Corrupted dies-trigger not implemented: exile it, then return up to X target cards from your graveyard to hand where X = opponents with 3+ poison. No triggered_abilities present.

cards.name: Glistening Sphere
issues: The Corrupted '{T}: Add three mana of any one color' ability lacks its activation gate — it should be activatable only if an opponent has 3+ poison counters, but the second mana ability has no condition, making it an unconditional 3-mana rock.

cards.name: Goldlust Triad
issues: 'Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token' trigger is missing entirely (needs a dealt_combat_damage_to_player triggered ability with create_token).

cards.name: Grasp of Fate
issues: 'for each opponent, exile up to one target nonland permanent that player controls' is not scaled per-opponent — exile_until_leaves is single-target, so it exiles only one permanent total (correct in 1v1, undershoots in multiplayer commander where it should exile one from EACH opponent)

cards.name: Grave Upheaval
issues: Basic landcycling {2} is not implemented — the script has no cycling/landcycling field, so the discard-to-fetch-a-basic alternate mode is entirely absent

cards.name: Gravecrawler
issues: 'as long as you control a Zombie' gate on the graveyard cast is not enforced — graveyard_cast_cost carries only mana {B} and the schema provides no condition slot, so it could be cast from the graveyard without controlling a Zombie

cards.name: Gray Merchant of Asphodel
issues: 'You gain life equal to the life lost this way' gains only devotion (X) once, but in multiplayer each opponent loses X so total life lost is X × opponents — the lifegain undercounts (no summed-life-lost count exists to source the correct amount)

cards.name: Great Oak Guardian
issues: Flash is not implemented (not in the honored keyword list / grant enum), so the creature can't be cast at instant speed

'creatures target player controls get +2/+2 ... untap them' is hardcoded to the controller's own creatures (pump_all scope:controller, untap_all target_controller:you) — there is no target-player choice and it cannot buff/untap another player's creatures

cards.name: Grip of Phyresis
issues: Targets target_type:'artifact' rather than Equipment specifically — the target-type enum has no 'equipment' and gain_control exposes no type filter, so it could steal a non-Equipment artifact (wrong scope)

'create a 0/0 Germ and attach that Equipment to it' is modeled via a living_weapon action, but living_weapon attaches the source permanent — here the source is an Instant, not the stolen Equipment, so it likely does not attach the just-stolen Equipment to a fresh Germ
gain_control has no duration set; the effect should be a permanent steal, and the engine's default duration is unspecified (uncertain — possible temporary-control defect)

cards.name: Grow from the Ashes
issues: Kicker {2} is not implemented — no kicker field and no conditional {counters:'kicked'} branch, so the kicked mode (search for TWO basic lands) is missing; it always fetches only one

cards.name: Guardian Idol
issues: enters_tapped is not set — the artifact should enter tapped but the script omits it, so it enters untapped (comes online a turn early)
'{2}: becomes a 2/2 Golem artifact creature until end of turn' animate ability is entirely missing

cards.name: Haunted Library
issues: Missing the optional cost gate 'you may pay {1}. If you do,' — create_token has no may/cost, so the token is created automatically and for free every time an opponent's creature dies.

cards.name: Hellkite Tyrant
issues: The upkeep win-condition 'if you control twenty or more artifacts, you win the game' is entirely missing (engine has no win-the-game effect regardless).
gain_control_all takes only type_line and has no player-scoping parameter, so it steals ALL artifacts on the battlefield rather than only those the damaged player controls.

cards.name: Helm of the Host
issues: The 'except the token isn't legendary' clause is not modeled — copy_permanent's 'except' schema has no legendary-removal option, so the copy is created as legendary. Practical impact depends on whether the engine enforces the legend rule (no evidence in the engine vocab that it does), so this is a fidelity gap rather than a confirmed break.

cards.name: Hermes, Overseer of Elpis
issues: Second ability 'Whenever you attack with one or more Birds, scry 2' is entirely missing (modelable via creature_attacks watcher with a Bird type_line/attackers_at_least filter).

cards.name: Hildibrand Manderville
issues: The dies trigger 'When Hildibrand dies, you may cast it from your graveyard as an Adventure until end of your next turn' is not implemented.

Token anthem is a loose continuous_effect with payload creature_type 'Token'; 'Token' is not a real creature subtype, so whether the filter matches any tokens at runtime is uncertain — the anthem may apply to nothing.

cards.name: Hoarding Ogre
issues: The d20 roll is modeled as a choose_one where the player self-picks the outcome tier (honor system) rather than a real random roll, so the player can always pick the 3-Treasure mode. The engine has no generic dice-roll primitive (delina_d20 is Delina's specific 'create tapped attacking copies' effect and cannot produce Treasure tiers), so the approximation is somewhat forced, but the always-pick-max behavior is a real power deviation from the intended random average.

cards.name: Hypnotic Sprite
issues: The adventure Mesmeric Glare counters any spell — the 'mana value 3 or less' restriction is not implemented (counter targets a target_type:'spell' with no mana-value filter available). Flying and the adventure structure are correct.

cards.name: Imperial Recruiter
issues: The 'power 2 or less' restriction on the searched creature is not implemented — search_library filter only supports type_line/type_line_any/name, so it tutors any creature card, materially broader than the card.

cards.name: In Garruk's Wake
issues: destroy_all with scope:'opponent' and no 'types' array falls through to destroy_all_creatures (creatures only), so 'all planeswalkers you don't control' are not destroyed. The runtime 'types' branch ignores scope, so opponent-only planeswalker destruction is not cleanly expressible. Opponent creatures are handled correctly.

cards.name: Inspiring Call
issues: grant_keyword_all scope:controller grants indestructible to ALL your creatures, but oracle limits it to only creatures with a +1/+1 counter ('those creatures'); grant_keyword_all has no counter filter to restrict it

cards.name: Into the Roil
issues: Kicker {1}{U} is not declared (no kicker field) so it cannot be paid
Missing the 'if kicked, draw a card' rider (no conditional on counters:'kicked')

cards.name: Into the Story
issues: Missing the {3} cost reduction when an opponent has 7+ cards in graveyard; no cost_reduction present and opponent-graveyard count is not in the supported count subset, so the spell always costs full price

cards.name: Itzquinth, Firstborn of Gishath
issues: Missing the optional 'you may pay {2}' reflexive gate (engine supports may{cost}) — the damage effect fires for free automatically

Damage amount approximated as greatest_power_you_control (Dinosaur) to a target creature rather than a chosen Dinosaur dealing its own power (loses source attribution / lifelink/deathtouch) and target_controller:any does not exclude the dino itself ('another target creature')

cards.name: Ixalli's Lorekeeper
issues: add_mana lacks the restriction (engine supports restriction{spell_type_line|ability_source_type_line}: Dinosaur) so it produces unrestricted any-color mana

cards.name: Ixhel, Scion of Atraxa
issues: toxic 2 is implemented as a continuous_effect type not in the engine's honored keyword/continuous-effect list; inert (no toxic/poison combat damage applied)

cards.name: Jagged-Scar Archers
issues: Activated damage ability can target any creature; single-target deal_damage has no keyword filter, so the 'target creature with flying' restriction is dropped (this is an anti-flyer card)

cards.name: Jaxis, the Troublemaker
issues: Blitz {1}{R} alternate cast cost is not modeled at all
No 'Activate only as a sorcery' timing restriction (activated_abilities support timing? field, unset here)
copy_permanent target_filter (controller:you, type_line:Creature) does not exclude self ('another target creature'), so it can copy Jaxis itself

cards.name: Kalain, Reclusive Painter
issues: Missing the static ability: other creatures you control enter with an additional +1/+1 counter for each mana from a Treasure spent to cast them — only the ETB Treasure token is implemented.

cards.name: Karmic Guide
issues: Echo {3}{W}{W} is not implemented (no echo flag), so the upkeep sacrifice-unless-pay drawback is never enforced.

cards.name: Keeper of Fables
issues: Missing the non-Human filter (no exclude_type:'Human') — Human creatures dealing combat damage will wrongly trigger a draw.
'one or more ... draw a card' aggregation not modeled: creature_damaged_player fires per creature, so multiple non-Human attackers draw multiple cards instead of one.

cards.name: Kindred Dominance
issues: destroy_all sets exclude_type:true but provides no creature_type:'$chosen' binding, so the exclusion has no chosen-type reference — it likely destroys all creatures including the chosen type.

cards.name: Kinjalli's Sunwing
issues: 'Creatures your opponents control enter tapped' — creatures_enter_tapped is not among the modeled replacement flags, so it is inert.
affected:'controller' is the wrong scope (would target the controller's own creatures, not opponents'). Flying works.

cards.name: Kirtar's Wrath
issues: Threshold clause missing: at 7+ cards in your graveyard it should also create two 1/1 white flying Spirit tokens — the script only does destroy_all.

cards.name: Knight of the White Orchid
issues: Intervening-if 'if an opponent controls more lands than you' is not implemented — the ETB search has no condition and always fires.
Search is not gated behind a 'may' (should be optional, minor).

cards.name: Labyrinth of Skophos
issues: The {4},{T}: remove target attacking or blocking creature from combat ability is entirely missing; only the {T}: Add {C} mana ability is scripted. CONFIRMED — and there is no remove-from-combat action in the engine vocabulary, so the ability is not expressible.

cards.name: Lathliss, Dragon Queen
issues: The {1}{R}: Dragons you control get +1/+0 until end of turn activated ability is missing (expressible via activated_abilities + pump_all scope creature_type Dragon, but absent). CONFIRMED. Flying and the nontoken-Dragon-enters token trigger are correctly scripted.

cards.name: Lethal Scheme
issues: Convoke (alternative tapping-to-pay cost) is not modeled — no engine support. CONFIRMED.
The connive rider — each creature that convoked this spell connives — is entirely missing; no connive action exists. CONFIRMED.

Target over-broadened to target_type 'permanent' instead of 'creature or planeswalker'; this actively allows destroying lands/artifacts/enchantments the card cannot legally hit. Correct scripting would be target_type ['creature','planeswalker']. CONFIRMED — this is a live correctness bug, not just an omission.

cards.name: Lightning Helix
issues: The 'you gain 3 life' half is entirely missing; only the deal_damage 3 is scripted (a gain_life action exists and could be added). CONFIRMED.
target_type ['creature','player'] omits 'planeswalker' for the 'any target' damage. CONFIRMED.

cards.name: Living Twister
issues: The first ability — {1}{R}, discard a land card: deal 2 damage to any target — is entirely missing (fully expressible via costs mana+discard and deal_damage); only the {G} land-bounce ability is scripted. CONFIRMED.

The {G} bounce filter (controller you, type_line land) does not require the returned land to be tapped, so untapped lands can be bounced. CONFIRMED (bounce_up_to target_filter has no tapped field, so the restriction may be inexpressible, but the discrepancy is real).

cards.name: Luxury Suite
issues: 'This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents' is not modeled — no enters_tapped/unless; land always enters untapped

cards.name: Lyse Hext
issues: 'Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less' cost reduction not implemented
Conditional double strike after casting 2+ noncreature spells this turn not implemented

cards.name: Maelstrom Pulse
issues: Only destroys the single target; 'and all other permanents with the same name as that permanent' is not implemented (no same-name mechanism in engine)

cards.name: Magus of the Will
issues: Mana cost is {2}{B}{B} in script but oracle is {2}{B} — one extra black pip
'you may play lands from your graveyard' not implemented (grant_cast_from_graveyard covers spells only)
Graveyard-replacement clause 'if a card would be put into your graveyard this turn, exile it instead' not implemented

cards.name: Mahadi, Emporium Master
issues: Uses count nontoken_creatures_died_this_turn but oracle counts EACH creature that died (including tokens) — should use creatures_died_this_turn; undercounts Treasures

cards.name: Majestic Heliopterus
issues: Attack trigger grants flying to any creature you control; missing 'Dinosaur' type_line filter
Missing 'another' (exclude_self) restriction — can target itself

cards.name: Malakir Bloodwitch
issues: gain_life uses Vampire count only; oracle gains life equal to TOTAL life lost this way (Vampires x number of opponents) — undercounts life gain in multiplayer

cards.name: Marauding Raptor
issues: cost_reduction amount is 2 but oracle is {1} less — wrong reduction amount
Missing rider: 'If a Dinosaur is dealt damage this way, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn'

cards.name: March of Wretched Sorrow
issues: Additional cost 'exile any number of black cards from hand, {2} less each' not implemented — the mechanism that funds X is missing (X damage/X life themselves are modeled)

cards.name: Marionette Master
issues: Death trigger uses creature_died filtered to artifacts, so only artifact CREATURES trigger it; oracle fires on ANY artifact you control put into graveyard from battlefield — non-creature artifacts are missed

cards.name: Markov Baron
issues: Convoke not implemented — no engine support for tapping creatures to help pay for the spell
Madness {2}{B} not implemented (engine supports flashback/kicker/adventure but not madness)

cards.name: Mayhem Devil
issues: Oracle says 'deals 1 damage to any target' but script uses target_type:'creature' — cannot hit players or planeswalkers (should be target_type:'any')

cards.name: Mentor of the Meek
issues: Missing the 'you may pay {1}' gate — script draws unconditionally instead of wrapping the draw in a may with cost {1}, making the draw free

cards.name: Meren of Clan Nel Toth
issues: Missing the mana-value gate — oracle returns the creature to the battlefield only if its MV <= your experience counters, otherwise to hand; script always returns to battlefield regardless (experience-counter accrual and 'your end step' timing via beginning_of_end_step are correct)

cards.name: Mina and Denn, Wildborn
issues: Uses continuous_effect type 'additional_land_plays' which is not in the documented engine vocabulary — unrecognized continuous-effect type likely silently no-ops, dropping the card's primary ability
grant_keyword restricted to target_controller:'you' but oracle allows targeting any creature ('target creature gains trample')

cards.name: Mirror Box
issues: Legend-rule suppression for your permanents is not implemented (engine has no legend-rule suppression per §5).

The same-name anthem ('each nontoken creature gets +1/+1 for each other creature you control with the same name') is not implemented and is unbuildable — no same-name count exists in §6; only the flat +1/+1 to legendary creatures is encoded.

cards.name: Mirror Gallery
issues: Empty script; the sole function ('legend rule doesn't apply') is not modelled and is engine-native-impossible (§5 — no legend-rule suppression).

cards.name: Multani, Yavimaya's Avatar
issues: The activated graveyard-recursion ability ({1}{G}, return two lands you control: return this card from graveyard to hand) is missing entirely — and it is buildable (return_land cost, return_self_to_hand, source_zone_required all exist); reach/trample and the +1/+1-per-land pump (lands_and_graveyard_lands) are correct.

cards.name: Myr Battlesphere
issues: The attack trigger (may tap X untapped Myr you control to give +X/+0 and deal X damage to the attacked player/planeswalker) is entirely missing; only the ETB four-Myr-token creation is implemented.

cards.name: Mystic Sanctuary
issues: Trigger fires on every enters_the_battlefield, but the ability only triggers 'when this land enters untapped'; the engine has no 'enters untapped' gate, so it wrongly fires even when the land enters tapped (the common case, <3 other Islands).

graveyard_to_library_top has no instant/sorcery filter and parks a pick over EVERY graveyard, so it offers any card type from any player's graveyard — oracle allows only an instant or sorcery card from YOUR graveyard.

cards.name: Naya Charm
issues: Mode 2 return_from_graveyard lacks from:'all_graveyards' — oracle returns a card from ANY graveyard, but the default scope is the caster's own graveyard only.
Mode 3 tap_all is hardcoded to target_controller 'opponent', but the oracle taps creatures a chosen 'target player' controls (could be any player, including yourself).

cards.name: Needle Spires
issues: The manland animation ability ({2}{R}{W}: becomes a 2/1 red-white Elemental with double strike until end of turn) is entirely missing; only enters-tapped and the R/W mana abilities are present. The engine's 'animate' action exists but is not used.

cards.name: Negate
issues: counter targets any spell — the 'noncreature' restriction is not enforced (spell target types carry no type_line filter), so it can wrongly counter creature spells.

cards.name: New Blood
issues: Additional cost 'tap an untapped Vampire you control' is not modeled, so the spell is castable with no Vampire.
The text-change effect (replace one creature type with Vampire) is not implemented. The permanent gain-control itself (no duration = permanent default) is correct.

cards.name: Nissa's Pilgrimage
issues: Spell mastery clause (search up to three basic Forests if 2+ instants/sorceries in graveyard) is entirely missing.
'up to two' is hardcoded as exactly one to battlefield + one to hand, so the optional/variable count is not honored.

cards.name: Norn's Decree
issues: Poison goes to 'each_opponent' but oracle gives the counter only to the opponent who dealt combat damage — should be 'triggering_controller'; over-broad in multiplayer.
Entire second ability is missing: 'Whenever a player attacks, if one or more players being attacked are poisoned, the attacking player draws a card.'

cards.name: Not Dead After All
issues: CORRECTION: the core reanimation is NOT broken — 'return_self_to_battlefield' is a real, handled action (mig 345 return_on_death; put_in_graveyard.sql fires dies-triggers so it finds the card in the graveyard), so the auditor's 'core may do nothing / high severity' is false.
Missing entirely: 'then create a Wicked Role token attached to it' (Aura giving +1/+1 and draining 1 on death) — a genuine chunk of the card is unmodeled.
No target_controller:'you' gate — oracle restricts to 'target creature you control' but grant_dies_effect can target any creature.

cards.name: Noxious Assault
issues: Missing the delayed rider entirely: 'Whenever a creature blocks this turn, its controller gets a poison counter.' Only the +2/+2 team pump is implemented.

cards.name: Oblation
issues: Missing 'then draws two cards' — the owner's card draw is not encoded (shuffle_into_library has no draw rider).
target_type is 'permanent' but oracle requires 'nonland permanent' — script can wrongly target lands (use nonland_permanent).

cards.name: Observed Stasis
