issues: Missing the entire ETB ability: 'remove enchanted creature from combat, then draw a card for each tapped creature its controller controls.'
Missing 'loses all abilities' — only cant_attack/cant_block are modeled.

cards.name: Obuun, Mul Daya Ancestor
issues: Combat animate uses target_type 'permanent' with no type_line land filter, so it can animate any permanent you control, not just a land (oracle: 'target land you control').
Elemental creature type is not set (animate only grants P/T + keywords).
Landfall counter restricts target_controller to 'you', but oracle says 'target creature' (any creature).

cards.name: Pantlaza, Sun-Favored
issues: Discover amount uses mana_value_of triggering_creature, but oracle X is the creature's toughness (toughness_of is a supported AmountSchema value); wrong magnitude

cards.name: Papalymo Totolymo
issues: Second ability entirely missing: {4},{T},Sacrifice — each opponent who lost life this turn sacrifices a creature with the greatest power they control

cards.name: Paradise Druid
issues: "hexproof as long as it's untapped" not implemented; no hexproof keyword or conditional continuous effect present

cards.name: Parting Thoughts
issues: Only destroy is implemented; missing "draw X and lose X where X is the number of counters on that creature"

cards.name: Plaguecrafter
issues: Sacrifice has no filter, and park_edict_sacrifice defaults eligibility to '%creature%' only — a player with only planeswalkers has no eligible permanent and is skipped, so they neither sacrifice a planeswalker nor trigger the fallback
'Each player who can't discards a card' fallback is not implemented — a player with no creature simply loses nothing

cards.name: Prairie Stream
issues: enters_tapped is hardcoded to true; the 'unless you control two or more basic lands' condition is dropped even though the engine supports it (enters_tapped.unless with the basic_lands_you_control count at_least 2) — the land always enters tapped

cards.name: Priest of the Blessed Graf
issues: Token count hardcoded to 1 instead of X = number of opponents who control more lands than you; no matching count exists in the engine, so it creates 1 even when no opponent qualifies and too few against multiple qualifying opponents

cards.name: Progenitor's Icon
issues: The 'As this enters, choose a creature type' ETB (choose_creature_type) is not scripted, despite being fully supported by the engine.
The {T} ability granting the next chosen-type spell flash is missing, and flash-granting is unsupported (grant_keyword enum excludes flash). Only the {T}: add any-color mana ability is implemented.

cards.name: Radiant Destiny
issues: The chosen-type +1/+1 anthem (pump) and choose_creature_type ETB are implemented; but Ascend / the city's blessing is unmodellable in the engine, so the conditional vigilance grant ('as long as you have the city's blessing, they also have vigilance') is missing.

cards.name: Rakdos Charm
issues: choose_one has only two of three modes; the third mode 'Each creature deals 1 damage to its controller' is missing entirely.

cards.name: Rattlechains
issues: ETB grants hexproof to a creature you control (target_type:creature, target_controller:you) instead of 'target Spirit' — wrong target pool (should allow any Spirit incl. opponents'); grant_keyword also cannot enforce the Spirit type restriction.
Missing the card's own Flash keyword (and flash is not in the engine-honored keyword list, so it would be inert regardless).
Static 'You may cast Spirit spells as though they had flash' has no engine mechanism and is not implemented at all.

cards.name: Regal Force
issues: Oracle draws for each GREEN creature; script's count 'creatures_you_control' omits the CountAmount 'color' field, so it draws for every creature and over-draws on any non-mono-green board.

cards.name: Remand
issues: counter{} exposes only unless_pays/controller_loses_life/surveil — no return-to-hand option, so the defining 'put it into its owner's hand instead of the graveyard' rider is dropped and Remand becomes a hard counter + draw (more punishing than the card).

cards.name: Render Silent
issues: 'Its controller can't cast spells this turn' has no engine cast-lock primitive, so it resolves as a plain counter.

cards.name: Reprobation
issues: set_pt correctly bases the creature at 0/1, but 'loses all abilities' has no standalone continuous-effect primitive and is not implemented — an enchanted threat keeps flying/deathtouch/activated abilities, defeating the aura's purpose.
Coward type change (loses other types/creature types) not modeled — mostly flavor but affects tribal interactions.

cards.name: Rewind
issues: 'Untap up to four lands' is unmodellable (no 'land' target type in the enum) and is dropped, so the mana-neutral free-counter upside is lost — script only counters.

cards.name: Rhoda, Geist Avenger
issues: The 'if it isn't being declared as an attacker' gate uses filter field 'not_attacking', which is not an enforced filter field, so it is silently ignored and Rhoda over-triggers on attack-taps — exactly the case the card excludes.
Partner with Timin (ETB: target player may tutor Timin to hand) is not implemented.

cards.name: Rhythm of the Wild
issues: 'Creature spells you control can't be countered' is not modellable — cant_be_countered only applies to the source card itself, not as an anthem over other spells — so this protection is entirely absent.

cards.name: Rip Apart
issues: First mode's deal_damage targets 'creature' only; oracle allows 'target creature or planeswalker' (planeswalker is a valid target_type), so the 3 damage can't hit a planeswalker.

cards.name: Rishkar's Expertise
issues: Draw clause (greatest_power_you_control) is correct.

Free-cast clause approximated as put_from_hand with filter permanent:true — only PERMANENT spells of MV<=5 can be chosen; instants/sorceries are excluded. It also puts the card directly onto the battlefield rather than casting it, so cast triggers/targeting do not occur (matches the engine's documented free-cast approximation).

cards.name: Rite of Replication
issues: Base effect (one token copy of target creature) is implemented via copy_permanent.
Kicker {5} is entirely absent: no top-level `kicker` field, so 'kicked' can never be set and the five-copies mode is never produced; count stays at the default 1.

cards.name: Rites of Flourishing
issues: Symmetric additional land play (additional_land_plays, affected:all) is implemented.

Missing 'At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player draws an additional card.' The engine has no per-player draw-step event (turn-step triggers fire only for the active player's own permanents), so the symmetric extra draw is unscripted and inexpressible.

cards.name: Rootborn Defenses
issues: Grants indestructible to your creatures correctly (grant_keyword_all, scope:controller).
Missing the Populate clause (create a copy of a creature token you control) — no populate action exists in the engine, so roughly half the card's value is absent.

cards.name: Runic Armasaur
issues: filter.type_line is empty ('') so the trigger is not restricted to a creature OR land — the engine documents this as an approximation (activate_ability.sql / fire_watcher_triggers.sql: default '' = any permanent type). It over-triggers on activated abilities of opponents' artifacts, enchantments, and planeswalkers.

NOTE: the 'that isn't a mana ability' exclusion IS correctly handled — mana abilities route through activate_mana_ability and never fire the ability_activated watcher (confirmed in activate_ability.sql:452-459). This is not a defect; removed from the auditor's list.

cards.name: Rupture Spire
issues: enters_tapped and the any-color mana ability are present.
Missing the ETB drawback 'When this land enters, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}' — no sacrifice-unless-pay trigger is scripted, so the card plays strictly better than printed.

cards.name: Sage's Nouliths
issues: Job select, equip {3}, and the +1/+0 pump are implemented.
Missing the granted triggered ability 'Whenever this creature attacks, untap target attacking creature' — no mechanism to grant a triggered ability to the equipped creature.
Missing the type-changing rider 'is a Cleric in addition to its other types' — no type-adding continuous effect is modeled.

cards.name: Sanguine Bond
issues: Oracle drains a single 'target opponent' but recipient is 'each_opponent' — in multiplayer (the deck's Commander format) this drains ALL opponents instead of one chosen target; materially stronger, wrong target scope.

cards.name: Seer's Sundial
issues: Missing the 'you may pay {2}. If you do, draw a card' gate — the script draws a card unconditionally and for free on every landfall, with no may.cost (may.cost is a supported, enforced mechanism, so this is a real omission that makes the card materially stronger).

cards.name: Shadow Rift
issues: Only 'draw a card' is implemented; 'target creature gains shadow until end of turn' is missing and unsupported (shadow not in grant_keyword enum; a raw keyword string would be inert), dropping the card's primary evasion effect.

cards.name: Shattering Spree
issues: Destroy target artifact is implemented, but Replicate {R} (copy the spell per replicate payment) is entirely absent and unmodelable in the vocabulary — the card's core value engine is missing.

cards.name: Shepherd of Rot
issues: Each player losing life is handled (each_opponent + controller), but the amount uses count 'creatures_you_control' type Zombie rather than every Zombie on the battlefield; the correct count 'creatures_on_battlefield' exists, so this undercounts when opponents control Zombies.

cards.name: Shimmer Myr
issues: Script is only {schema_version:2}: Flash (not honored/grantable) and the 'cast artifact spells as though they had flash' static are both absent and unmodelable, so the card has no gameplay effect.

cards.name: Shriekmaw
issues: ETB destroy has no target filter (creature only) — can hit artifact and black creatures, but oracle restricts to nonartifact, nonblack.
Evoke {1}{B} alternate cast + sacrifice-on-enter is not implemented (no engine support encoded).

cards.name: Sire of the Storm
issues: filter type_line is only 'Spirit'; Arcane spells (a distinct subtype) never trigger the draw, so half the printed trigger scope is missing and the single-string type_line filter can't cover both.

cards.name: Slip Through Space
issues: The primary effect — target creature can't be blocked this turn — is entirely missing (grant_keyword enum has no unblockable/can't-be-blocked); only the 'draw a card' rider is scripted, and the spell declares no target at all.

cards.name: Slobad, Goblin Tinkerer
issues: grant_keyword target_type is 'creature' but the ability targets an artifact — wrong target scope; it can't grant indestructible to noncreature artifacts and can wrongly target creatures.
target_controller 'you' restricts to your own permanents, but the oracle says 'target artifact' (any controller).

cards.name: Snapcaster Mage
issues: Flash is not encoded (not in keywords, and flash isn't in the engine's honored/grantable keyword set, so it's inert text); the creature can't be cast at instant speed, which is core to the card. The ETB grant_flashback itself is correctly implemented.

cards.name: Snuff Out
issues: destroy has no target filter (creature only) — can hit black creatures, but oracle restricts to nonblack.
Alternate cost 'if you control a Swamp, pay 4 life rather than mana cost' is not implemented (alt costs unsupported). ('Can't be regenerated' is moot — engine has no regeneration.)

cards.name: Sorin, Imperious Bloodlord
issues: First +1 omits the 'If it's a Vampire, put a +1/+1 counter on it' rider entirely (no add_counters step).
Second +1 deals 3 damage to each_opponent instead of 'any target' — cannot choose a single creature/planeswalker/player, and it hits every opponent at once in multiplayer.

Second +1 has no 'if you do' linkage: the 3 damage and 3 life run in sequence after the sacrifice rather than being gated on a Vampire actually being sacrificed, so with any creature but no Vampire the may can still fire the damage/lifegain. Additionally may.condition keys on creatures_you_control (any creature) rather than on controlling a Vampire.

cards.name: Soul of New Phyrexia
issues: Missing Trample keyword (no keywords array).
Missing the second activated ability ('{5}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Permanents you control gain indestructible') — only the on-battlefield {5} version is scripted.

cards.name: Soul-Guide Lantern
issues: '{T}, Sacrifice: Exile each opponent's graveyard' is scripted as exile_graveyard, which per vocab affects only one opponent's graveyard, undershooting in multiplayer/commander.

cards.name: Spectator Seating
issues: 'enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents' is scripted as unconditional enters_tapped: true, so it always enters tapped — including in the 2+ opponent commander tables this app targets, where it should enter untapped.

cards.name: Spectral Arcanist
issues: grant_cast_from_graveyard only grants 'instant', omitting sorcery.
Does not enforce the 'mana value <= number of Spirits you control' cap.

'without paying its mana cost' free-cast is not modeled — grant_cast_from_graveyard grants permission to cast (still paying cost), and grants it as a this-turn blanket permission rather than a one-shot single cast.
'if that spell would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead' replacement not modeled.

cards.name: Spit Flame
issues: Missing the entire recursion trigger: 'Whenever a Dragon you control enters, you may pay {R}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand' — only the 4-damage spell effect is scripted (modelable via a creature_entered watcher trigger with source_zone_required graveyard + may cost {R} + return_self_to_hand).

cards.name: Splinter Twin
issues: copy_self is not an engine action type (the copy family is copy_permanent/become_copy/saw_in_half/delina_d20/blink); per the vocab's passthrough rule an unrecognized action type validates but no-ops at runtime, so the token copy is never created — and that copy is the aura's only effect.

The granted_ability continuous_effect wiring cannot be verified from the vocab (payload is a listed loose field, but granted_ability is not documented as functional); regardless it is moot, since the granted ability's sole effect no-ops. Net result: the card does nothing.

cards.name: Springbloom Druid
issues: 'you may sacrifice a land' is scripted as a forced sacrifice (no may wrapper).
No 'if you do' linkage — the search runs as an independent sequential effect rather than being gated on the sacrifice actually occurring, so the land fetch can happen even when no land is sacrificed.

cards.name: Storm of Souls
issues: Missing 'Each of them is a 1/1 Spirit with flying in addition to its other types' — return_all_from_graveyard has no P/T override, type grant, or flying grant, so creatures come back with full printed stats instead of 1/1.

return_all_from_graveyard exposes no creature-only filter; the oracle returns only creature cards, so this may over-return other graveyard card types depending on engine behavior (unverifiable from vocab).
Missing 'Exile Storm of Souls' self-exile (minor).

cards.name: Stroke of Genius
issues: 'Target player draws X cards' — no target/choose_player wrapper; draw defaults to the controller, so an opponent can never be the recipient. Self-draw (common use) works; targeting capability is absent.

cards.name: Struggle // Survive
issues: Only the Struggle half (deal_damage = lands_you_control to target creature) is scripted; the Survive/Aftermath half ('Each player shuffles their graveyard into their library') is entirely unimplemented (no aftermath/second-half program).

cards.name: Sublime Epiphany
issues: Only 3 of 5 modes present. 'Counter target spell' is missing and IS implementable via the counter action (a primary use). 'Counter target activated or triggered ability' is also missing and is NOT engine-implementable (no ability target type).
choose_up_to is 3, but 'choose one or more' should allow up to all (5) modes.

cards.name: Sudden Salvation
issues: Missing the 'that were put there from the battlefield this turn' restriction — any matching graveyard card is eligible.
return_from_graveyard lacks from:'all_graveyards', so it only pulls from your own graveyard under your control; oracle targets cards in all graveyards and returns them under their owners' control.
The rider 'You draw a card for each opponent who controls one or more of those permanents' is not implemented.

cards.name: Summon: Good King Mog XII
issues: Chapters II/III have empty effects[]; the delayed trigger 'Whenever you cast a noncreature spell this turn, create a token that's a copy of a non-Saga token you control' is entirely unimplemented.

cards.name: Sunken Ruins
issues: Only '{T}: Add {C}' is scripted; the core filter-land ability '{U/B}, {T}: Add {U}{U}, {U}{B}, or {B}{B}' (the entire color-fixing value of the card) is missing, leaving it a colorless-only source.

cards.name: Swan Song
issues: counter action uses target_type 'spell' with no spell-type filter (engine has no such filter on counter) — can counter ANY spell incl. creatures, but oracle restricts to enchantment/instant/sorcery
Missing the 'its controller creates a 2/2 blue Bird token with flying' clause — no create_token (should be recipient:'target_controller'); the drawback is entirely absent

cards.name: Sylvan Reclamation
issues: Uses destroy_up_to but oracle says EXILE (no exile_up_to in vocab); destroy differs materially re: indestructible/recursion
Basic landcycling is modeled as plain cycling '{2}' (draw a card) instead of searching library for a basic land card to hand

cards.name: Tamiyo's Safekeeping
issues: Target scope too narrow: oracle is 'target permanent you control' but the script uses target_type 'creature', so it cannot protect a noncreature permanent (artifact/enchantment/planeswalker/land). The enum offers 'permanent'/'nonland_permanent'; 'creature' is the wrong choice.

cards.name: Temple of the False God
issues: Missing the activation restriction 'Activate only if you control five or more lands' — the mana ability has no condition gate (which the engine supports for activated abilities), so it can be tapped for {C}{C} with fewer than five lands.

cards.name: Terror of the Peaks
issues: Damage trigger uses target_type 'creature'; oracle is 'any target' and the enum includes 'any', so scope was needlessly narrowed (cannot hit players/planeswalkers)
Missing static: opponents' spells targeting this creature cost an additional 3 life (no engine mechanism, but the clause is unrepresented)

cards.name: The Fire Crystal
issues: Missing static cost reduction: red spells you cast cost {1} less (no cost_reduction of any kind in the script)
copy_permanent lacks except.cleanup_at_end_step (a supported field), so the copy token persists forever instead of being sacrificed at the next end step

cards.name: The Master, Multiplied
issues: Static 'legend rule doesn't apply to your creature tokens' not implemented (no engine flag)
Static 'your triggered abilities can't make you sacrifice/exile your creature tokens' not implemented (no engine flag)

cards.name: Thunderbreak Regent
issues: becomes_target is a self-event, so it only fires when Thunderbreak itself is targeted — misses 'a Dragon you control' (other Dragons); no watcher event exists for a permanent becoming targeted
No 'spell or ability an opponent controls' gate, so it over-fires when you target your own Thunderbreak
deal_damage:3 specifies no recipient, so it will not correctly deal damage to 'that player' (the controller of the targeting spell/ability)

cards.name: Timin, Youthful Geist
issues: 'Partner with Rhoda' ETB tutor (target player may put Rhoda into hand from library) is not implemented.
'At the beginning of each combat' is scripted with beginning_of_combat, which fires only for the active player, so it never triggers during opponents' combats.
'tap up to one target creature' is wrongly restricted to opponent creatures (target_controller: opponent) and not made optional; the card allows any creature and up to one.

cards.name: Trailblazer's Boots
issues: The granted 'nonbasic landwalk' evasion is not implemented (grant_keyword enum has no landwalk); equip attaches but confers no benefit.

cards.name: Treacherous Terrain
issues: 'Basic landcycling {2}' is modeled as generic cycling (draw a card) instead of searching the library for a basic land card.

opponent_lands resolves to the total lands of ALL non-controller players (confirmed in resolve_count_amount.sql, a documented '1v1 reading'), so with each_opponent recipient every opponent is dealt the combined land count rather than only their own — wrong in multiplayer/Commander.

cards.name: Treasure Cruise
issues: Delve not implemented (no engine support); the spell always costs full price rather than reducing {1} per graveyard card exiled. Draw three works.

cards.name: Triplicate Spirits
issues: Convoke not implemented (no engine support); creatures cannot help pay the cost. Token creation itself is correct.

cards.name: Twilight Drover
issues: The creature_left filter uses 'token: true', which is not in the enforced filter set (only 'nontoken' exists) — the restriction no-ops, so it triggers on ANY creature leaving, over-triggering extra counters.
Activated ability correctness depends on the 'Spirit Token' definition carrying 1/1 white + flying.

cards.name: Unbreakable Formation
issues: Addendum gate is honor-system: the 'cast during your main phase' condition lives only in the may.prompt string (display-only) with no condition object, and the engine has no phase-based gate to enforce it.
Addendum modeled as an optional 'may' rather than an automatic consequence when the condition is met.

cards.name: Undead Warchief
issues: Cost reduction missing: 'Zombie spells you cast cost {1} less' is not implemented (cost_reduction only reduces the card's own cost); only the +2/+1 Zombie anthem is scripted.

cards.name: Vault of Champions
issues: enters_tapped is hardcoded true with no unless clause, ignoring 'unless you have two or more opponents'; in typical multiplayer Commander (2+ opponents) it should enter untapped but always enters tapped.

cards.name: Vein Ripper
issues: Ward—Sacrifice a creature is not implemented: ward is not in the engine's honored keyword list, is not a grantable keyword, and no ward mechanic exists, so the protective cost is entirely absent.

Oracle 'target opponent loses 2 life' (one chosen opponent); script uses recipient each_opponent, so in a multiplayer commander game ALL opponents lose 2 life each creature death instead of one — a real power increase given this is a couch-commander app.

cards.name: Verity Circle
issues: Activated ability's target lacks the 'without flying' restriction: single-target tap has no with/without-keyword filter available (only deal_damage_all does), so flyers can be tapped, which the card forbids.
Activated ability restricted to target_controller:opponent, but oracle '{4}{U}: Tap target creature without flying' targets ANY creature (yours or an opponent's).

Confirmed: not_attacking is not among the mechanically-enforced filter fields (vocab §2), so it passes the loose schema but no-ops. Since creature_became_tapped fires on the attack-tap too, the draw wrongly triggers when an opponent's creature taps to attack — exactly the case the oracle's 'if it isn't being declared as an attacker' clause excludes.
'you may draw a card' is scripted as an unconditional draw with no may gate.

cards.name: Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose
issues: Oracle 'target opponent loses that much life' (one chosen opponent); script uses recipient each_opponent, draining ALL opponents in multiplayer each lifegain event instead of one — a meaningful deviation in a commander context.

cards.name: Vraska's Fall
issues: sacrifice who:'opponent' is a single-opponent edict, but oracle is 'Each opponent sacrifices'; should be who:'each_opponent' (the very next action, add_poison, correctly uses each_opponent, confirming the inconsistency).
sacrifice has no filter, but oracle restricts the choice to 'a creature or planeswalker'; without a filter an opponent can dodge by sacrificing a land or token.

cards.name: Waker of the Wilds
issues: Both actions use target_type:'permanent' with no land type_line filter, so the counters and animation can be applied to any permanent you control rather than only a land (land targeting must go via a type_line filter on animate per vocab §2/§5).

add_counters and animate are two independently-targeted actions in the same activated ability with no shared targets[]/target_ref, so the X +1/+1 counters and the 0/0-Elemental animation can land on different permanents instead of the single chosen land.

cards.name: Wayfarer's Bauble
issues: Activation mana cost is scripted as {1} but the oracle cost is {2}; the ability is underpriced by one generic mana (clear transcription error).

cards.name: Wayta, Trainer Prodigy
issues: Static ability 'If a creature you control being dealt damage causes a triggered ability to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time' is unimplemented — no engine support for extra trigger firing.
Cost reduction '{2} less if it targets two creatures you control' is unimplemented — cost_reduction is a spell-cast flag, not usable on activated-ability costs.

cards.name: Wellwisher
issues: Oracle gains life for 'each Elf on the battlefield' (all players), but the script counts creatures_you_control type_line:Elf, undercounting opponents' Elves; the engine exposes creatures_on_battlefield which would be the correct count.

cards.name: Wight of Precinct Six
issues: cda uses plus:1 on both power and toughness while the printed P/T is 0/0, producing (count+1)/(count+1) instead of count/count — always one too large (and it survives as a 1/1 when it should be a 0/0 that dies with no creature cards in opponents' graveyards).

cards.name: Worn Powerstone
issues: 'This artifact enters tapped' is not implemented — no enters_tapped flag — so it enters untapped and can tap for {C}{C} the turn it resolves, an unintended acceleration.

cards.name: Wrathful Raptors
issues: Redirect target_type is limited to 'creature'; oracle says 'any target'. deal_damage supports a target_type list ('any target' -> creature + player + planeswalker per schema comment), so restricting to creature means it can never burn a player or planeswalker.
No 'that isn't a Dinosaur' exclusion on the redirect target (engine has no exclude_type on deal_damage targets); it could be aimed at one of your own Dinosaurs — minor.

cards.name: Xantcha, Sleeper Agent
issues: 'Attacks each combat if able' forced-attack requirement is not modeled (engine cannot enforce forced attacks).
'Can't attack its owner or planeswalkers its owner controls' restriction is not modeled.
'Any player may activate this ability' is not modeled — only the permanent's controller can activate.
The draw has no recipient, so it defaults to the source's controller (the opponent Xantcha was donated to) rather than the activating player, so activating it actually draws a card for the opponent.

cards.name: Xenagos, God of Revels
issues: 'Another target creature' — the pump/grant_keyword targets lack an exclude_self flag (pump schema has no exclude_self field), so when Xenagos is a creature it could illegally target itself.
The 'as long as devotion to red and green is less than seven, Xenagos isn't a creature' clause is not implemented (engine has no conditional 'is not a creature'); Xenagos is always a creature.

cards.name: Zenith Festival
issues: The Harmonize {X}{R}{R} graveyard-cast alternative (with tap-a-creature power-based cost reduction) is not modeled at all; only the main 'exile top X, play until end of next turn' effect (impulse count X) is present, which is correct.

cards.name: Alphinaud Leveilleur
issues: Partner-with is modeled as an auto search_library to the controller's own hand, not optional ('may') and not 'target player' — Eukrasia (spell_number:2 draw) is correctly implemented

cards.name: Apex Altisaur
issues: Uses 'fight' (mandatory target) rather than 'fight_pick' (the declinable pick), so the 'up to one' optionality of both the ETB and Enrage fights is lost — forced to fight when a legal opponent creature exists

cards.name: Arcane Denial
issues: 'Its controller may draw up to two cards at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep' is not implemented — the countered spell's controller never draws (a missing drawback favoring the caster)
Self-draw is immediate rather than at next upkeep (cosmetic timing difference, acceptable)

cards.name: Arch of Orazca
issues: Ascend/city's blessing modeled as a live permanents_you_control>=10 activation gate rather than a permanent status — once earned the blessing should persist, but dropping below 10 permanents would wrongly re-disable the draw ability

cards.name: Archmage Emeritus
issues: 'or copy' half of Magecraft is not implemented — no copy watcher event exists, so copying an instant/sorcery won't trigger the draw; the cast half (two spell_cast triggers for Instant/Sorcery) is correct

cards.name: Azorius Chancery
issues: 'return a land you control' is mandatory (exactly one), but bounce_up_to (count 1) is declinable, so a controller could return zero. Best available encoding since there is no 'land' target type; minor deviation.

cards.name: Azorius Locket
issues: Sacrifice ability cost modeled as {4} generic instead of {W/U}{W/U}{W/U}{W/U}; the script cost is more permissive (payable with any color) than four W/U hybrid symbols.

cards.name: Baneslayer Angel
issues: 'protection from Demons and from Dragons' not implemented — the engine only supports color-based protection (continuous_effect from:), not creature-type protection.

cards.name: Baral, Chief of Compliance
issues: Cost-reduction (first ability) is correctly encoded for Instant and Sorcery. Missing second ability: 'Whenever a spell or ability you control counters a spell, you may draw a card; if you do, discard a card' — absent from the script (no counter-spell watcher event exists to fire it).

cards.name: Battlefield Forge
issues: 'This land deals 1 damage to you' modeled as lose_life 1 rather than deal_damage; near-identical in play but differs for damage-triggered and damage-prevention effects (deal_damage with recipient:controller is available).

cards.name: Blasphemous Edict
issues: The alternative cost 'pay {B} rather than mana cost if there are 13+ creatures' is not implemented (engine has no alternative-cost feature); the each-player-sacrifices-13 effect itself works

cards.name: Blight Mamba
issues: The '{1}{G}: Regenerate this creature' activated ability is missing; the engine has no regenerate primitive so it cannot currently be expressed (infect, contrary to the original audit, IS fully enforced by the combat engine)

cards.name: Blightbelly Rat
issues: Niet beoordeeld: de audit-agent liet deze kaart weg uit zijn antwoord.

cards.name: Bountiful Landscape
issues: Fetch filter is 'Basic Land' (any basic), but oracle restricts to a basic Forest, Island, or Mountain — allows fetching Plains/Swamp it shouldn't

cards.name: Breaching Dragonstorm
issues: Free cast via exile_until_nonland is approximated as direct battlefield entry, not the optional 'you may cast it without paying its mana cost'
The 'if you don't cast, put that card into your hand' fallback (and the MV>8 case that always goes to hand) is not modeled by the action

cards.name: Captivating Vampire
issues: The rider 'It becomes a Vampire in addition to its other types' is not modeled — gain_control adds no type, so the stolen creature won't gain the +1/+1 anthem or count toward the five-Vampire tap cost

cards.name: Circle of Power
issues: The token's own triggered ability ('whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this token deals 1 damage to each opponent') is not defined in this script — it relies on an external 'Wizard Token' definition that cannot be verified here. Draw/lose-life core, plus the +1/+0 and lifelink anthem on Wizards you control, are all correct.

cards.name: Circuitous Route
issues: filter is 'basic land' only — the 'and/or Gate cards' half of the search is not fetchable. The up-to-two, enters-tapped, shuffle mechanics are correct.

cards.name: Clavileño, First of the Blessed
issues: 'becomes a Demon in addition to its other types' type-addition is not modeled by the engine (no type-change action)
'that isn't a Demon' target restriction is not enforced (moot in practice because once_per_turn limits it to one creature per attack)
Approximates 'target attacking Vampire' via creature_attacks + filter{controller:you, Vampire} + once_per_turn; the granted dies-effect (draw + tapped Vampire Demon token) is correctly present.

cards.name: Coastal Breach
issues: Undaunted ({1} less per opponent) is not implemented; cost_reduction only supports a fixed amount with an optional count gate, not per-opponent scaling. The bounce-all-nonland effect itself is correct.

cards.name: Conjurer's Closet
issues: blink lacks the optional flag — oracle is 'you may exile target creature you control', but the scripted blink is mandatory, so a creature is forced to blink every end step. Trigger timing (your end step) and self-control blink are otherwise correct.

cards.name: Cranial Plating
issues: The {B}{B}: Attach to target creature you control ability (instant-speed re-attach) is not implemented; only Equip {1} is present. The +1/+0-per-artifact buff and Equip {1} are correct.

cards.name: Culling Ritual
issues: Card says 'Add {B} or {G} for each permanent destroyed' (player's choice) but the script hardcodes mana_per_destroyed 'B' — only black is produced, the green option is unavailable. (Re-derived against real oracle: destroy_all_mv correctly enforces the nonland restriction, MV<=2 filter, indestructible survival, and per-permanent mana count — those earlier uncertainties are resolved.)

cards.name: Deceptive Frostkite
issues: "except it's a Dragon in addition to its other types" is not granted — copy effects do not model added types (edge-case). Power-4+ / controller-you gating and flying grant are correct.

cards.name: Demon's Disciple
issues: The each-player edict is correctly split into you + each_opponent, but the sacrifice actions have no filter — the oracle's "creature or planeswalker" restriction is not enforced.

cards.name: Descendants' Path
issues: reveal_top_cast_shared runs on your upkeep with correct player scope, but its free cast is non-optional per engine semantics, whereas the oracle says "you may cast it" (otherwise bottom it) — the choice is not honored.

cards.name: Didn't Say Please
issues: "Its controller mills three cards" is missing — counter supports only controller_loses_life/surveil riders, not mill, so the mill clause has no engine expression here.

cards.name: Dimir Aqueduct
issues: enters_tapped and {T}: Add {U}{B} are correct. ETB uses bounce_up_to (declinable) but the oracle "return a land you control" is mandatory, so the script lets a player decline when they should be forced (minor).

cards.name: Dissolve
issues: Missing the 'Scry 1' rider after the counter (the parenthetical is reminder text)

cards.name: Dreadhorde Invasion
issues: The lifelink attack trigger uses 'token': true, which is not a recognized watcher filter field (only 'nontoken' exists) — Zod strips the unknown key, so the token-only restriction is silently dropped and nontoken power-6 Zombies would also gain lifelink. Upkeep lose-life + amass and the rest of the attack trigger are correct.

cards.name: Duneblast
issues: Uses mass_destroy_reanimate_one (destroy-all-then-return-one), the documented approximation; the survivor is destroyed and reanimated rather than never destroyed, so it can lose counters/auras, be summoning-sick, and may return under the caster's control.
'Choose up to one' permits choosing zero (full wipe); reanimate-one appears to force keeping/returning exactly one.

cards.name: Elves of Deep Shadow
issues: Missing the drawback 'This creature deals 1 damage to you' each time the mana ability is used.

cards.name: Elvish Champion
issues: The +1/+1 anthem to all Elves is correct, but the granted 'forestwalk' keyword is not implemented (not in the grant_keyword enum).

cards.name: Elvish Rejuvenator
issues: look_top has no 'tapped' disposition (schema: count/picks/min_picks/to/filter only), so the land enters untapped instead of tapped as the oracle requires

cards.name: End-Raze Forerunners
issues: ETB pump_all/grant_keyword_all use scope 'controller', which includes the source (pump_all has no exclude_self), but the oracle says 'other creatures you control', so Forerunners buffs itself

cards.name: Eshki, Temur's Roar
issues: The power>=6 clause is modeled as lose_life (amount power_of source, recipient each_opponent) rather than deal_damage, bypassing damage prevention/redirection and damage-triggered effects; deal_damage supports recipient each_opponent, so this could be modeled faithfully

cards.name: Etchings of the Chosen
issues: The activated ability's sacrifice_creature cost is a generic creature sacrifice with no type filter, not restricted to 'a creature of the chosen type', so any creature can be sacrificed

cards.name: Eternal Witness
issues: Oracle says 'you may return' — script wraps return_from_graveyard with no `may`, so the return is forced when a legal target exists (fixable via may{}). Minor edge case.

cards.name: Executioner's Capsule
issues: Missing the 'nonblack' restriction — destroy targets any creature, so it can destroy black creatures it shouldn't (no color filter on destroy in the engine, but the deviation is real). The dropped {T} cost is non-material since the artifact is sacrificed in the same cost.

cards.name: Exotic Orchard
issues: Adds 'any' color instead of restricting to colors an opponent's land could produce — over-permissive approximation; engine cannot inspect opponents' lands, so unavoidable.

cards.name: Fertilid
issues: 'Target player searches their library' is not modeled — search_library has no target-player/who param and defaults to the controller, so the search cannot be directed at another player. Counters (enters with two +1/+1) and cost ({1}{G}, remove a counter) are correct. Rarely relevant in practice.

cards.name: Fiery Confluence
issues: Mode 3 uses destroy_up_to (declinable — you can pick 0) rather than a required 'destroy target artifact'; minor. NOTE: the auditor's 'same mode more than once not enforced' claim is FALSE — choose_mode applies no distinctness check (unlike scry/surveil/choose_cards which explicitly reject repeats), and resolution splices the chosen mode's actions per submitted index including repeats, so choosing one mode three times (e.g. 6 damage to each opponent) works.

cards.name: From the Rubble
issues: 'with a finality counter on it' is unmodeled — no 'finality' counter in the enum and no exile-instead-of-dying replacement support, so the self-limiting clause is missing.
choose_creature_type restricts to 6 hardcoded options; card allows any creature type.

cards.name: Frontier Siege
issues: Dragons-mode fight has no 'may' wrapper and is scripted as mandatory; oracle says 'you may have it fight'.

cards.name: Gather the Townsfolk
issues: Fateful hour 'If you have 5 or less life, create five instead' is not implemented — no life-total count exists in the condition enum to gate on.
Token identity is 'Soldier Token' rather than a 1/1 white Human, a creature-type mismatch.

cards.name: Glorybringer
issues: Exert damage target lacks the 'non-Dragon' restriction (no exclude_type_line) — it can hit any creature an opponent controls, including Dragons.

cards.name: Goblin Bombardment
issues: 'Any target' should include planeswalkers; target_type is only [creature, player], so planeswalkers can't be hit.

cards.name: Golgari Rot Farm
issues: ETB return-a-land is mandatory on the card, but bounce_up_to (count 1) is a declinable/optional parked pick — the player could choose to return nothing, skipping the intended drawback.

cards.name: Grateful Apparition
issues: Trigger only fires on combat damage to a player (dealt_combat_damage_to_player); 'or planeswalker' combat damage does not trigger proliferate
Engine proliferate is limited to +1/+1 counters per the vocab note, so 'give each another counter of each kind' is approximated (other counter kinds not proliferated)

cards.name: Grim Haruspex
issues: Morph {B} (face-down cast for {3}, flip for {B}) is not implemented — no morph support in the script/schema; only the death-draw trigger works

cards.name: Gruul Turf
issues: The bounce is modeled as bounce_up_to (declinable 'up to one'), but oracle 'return a land you control' is mandatory — making the drawback optional is a small buff (bounce_up_to is the only land-bounce tool available, but it is still declinable here)

cards.name: Guardian Project
issues: Niet beoordeeld: de audit-agent liet deze kaart weg uit zijn antwoord.

cards.name: Hammerhead Tyrant
issues: The 'mana value less than or equal to that spell's mana value' restriction uses max_mana_value:'triggering_spell', a value not documented as supported (vocab lists n | 'event_amount', and mana_value_of accepts only 'target'/'triggering_creature') — the MV cap is plausibly unenforced, allowing bounce of an opponent's nonland permanent of any mana value on each spell cast

cards.name: Haven of the Spirit Dragon
issues: Graveyard-return ability filters type_line 'Dragon'; the 'or Ugin planeswalker card' half is not implemented (Ugin's type_line carries the 'Ugin' subtype, not 'Dragon', so it won't match).
Return filter is not restricted to Dragon *creature* cards specifically (minor approximation).

cards.name: Hour of Reckoning
issues: Convoke (tap creatures to help pay the cost) is not modeled; the spell must be cast for full mana. destroy_all with exclude_type:'Token' correctly destroys all nontoken creatures.

cards.name: Hour of Revelation
issues: The '{3} less if ten or more nonland permanents on the battlefield' cost reduction is absent and unmodelable (no all-battlefield nonland-permanent count). Destroy all nonland permanents IS correct: the runtime destroy_all 'types' array branch (apply_triggered_ability_effects.sql) matches creature/artifact/enchantment/planeswalker.

cards.name: Inferno Titan
issues: Activated {R} ability is templated as pump on target_type:creature/target_controller:you (any creature you control) instead of self-only +1/+0; engine has no 'source' pump target, so it over-permissively lets any of your creatures be pumped

cards.name: Jarad's Orders
issues: Modeled as two independent count-1 searches (one to hand, one to graveyard) rather than a single "up to two" pick; minor loss of the up-to flexibility

cards.name: Krosan Grip
issues: Split second not modeled — no engine support exists for it, so the spell can be responded to normally. CONFIRMED. Destroy target artifact/enchantment (target_type ['artifact','enchantment']) is correct.

cards.name: Light Up the Stage
issues: Spectacle {R} alternative cost not modeled — no engine support. CONFIRMED. The impulse-of-2 effect (impulse count 2, playable until end of next turn) is correct.

cards.name: Lightning Bolt
issues: target_type is ['creature','player']; 'any target' should also include 'planeswalker' (both are in the target-type enum), so it cannot damage a planeswalker. CONFIRMED.

cards.name: Lightning Greaves
issues: Shroud approximated as hexproof (grant_keyword enum has no shroud). Real functional difference: the equipped creature can still be targeted by its own controller, whereas Greaves' shroud blocks all targeting. CONFIRMED. Haste and equip {0} are correct.

cards.name: Master of Etherium
issues: Anthem uses continuous pump with creature_type:'artifact' — 'artifact' is a card type, not a creature subtype, so the +1/+1 to other artifact creatures may match nothing and silently no-op (CDA power/toughness = artifacts_you_control is correct)

cards.name: Mayhem Patrol
issues: Blitz {1}{R} not implemented (no engine support — no haste grant, dies-draw, or sacrifice at next end step). Menace and the attack pump are correct.

cards.name: Meteor Golem
issues: Uses target_type:'permanent' but oracle restricts to a NONLAND permanent — engine enum has 'nonland_permanent'; script can currently destroy an opponent's land

cards.name: Migratory Route
issues: Basic landcycling {2} approximated as plain cycling {2} (draw a card) instead of searching for a basic land card — different effect. Token creation is correct.

cards.name: Mind Games
issues: Buyback {2}{U} not implemented (no engine support — spell cannot be returned to hand on resolution). The tap effect is present, though target_type:'permanent' is broader than 'artifact, creature, or land'.

cards.name: Mulldrifter
issues: Evoke {2}{U} alternative cost (cast cheaper, sacrificed on ETB) is not encoded and no evoke primitive exists in the vocab; only flying + ETB draw-2 are present.

cards.name: Murderous Rider
issues: Dies trigger uses shuffle_self_into_library, but oracle says put on the BOTTOM of the library; the vocab has no bottom-of-library action so shuffle is the closest approximation, randomizing library order instead of deterministic bottoming (minor mechanical difference). Lifelink and the Swift End adventure are correct.

cards.name: Myriad Landscape
issues: 'that share a land type' constraint is not enforced — the search_library filter is just type_line 'Basic Land', so any two differing basics (e.g. Island + Forest) can be fetched rather than two of the same land type.

cards.name: Naya Panorama
issues: Search filter is 'basic land' generically; oracle restricts the fetch to a basic Mountain, Forest, or Plains — Island/Swamp should not be fetchable.

cards.name: Nebelgast Herald
issues: Flash is not implemented and is outside the engine's honored keyword list, so it cannot be enforced. Flying (continuous_effect) and the Spirit-ETB tap trigger (creature_entered, includes self since exclude_self is unset) are correct.

cards.name: Nesting Dragon
issues: Flying and the landfall create_token trigger are correct, but the Dragon Egg token's defender and its death trigger (create a 2/2 flying Dragon with firebreathing) live in the external token registry not present in this chunk — cannot verify those sub-abilities carry through.

cards.name: Nogi, Draco-Zealot
issues: 'becomes a Dragon' type change is not modeled (the engine has no creature-type grant); only set_pt 5/5 + grant flying are applied, so it never gains the Dragon type (matters for tribal counting). Cost reduction and the Dragon-count intervening gate are correctly enforced.

cards.name: Norn's Annex
issues: CORRECTION: 'attack_tax' IS a mechanically-enforced continuous effect — declare_attacker.sql auto-pays it and mig 275 names this exact card, so it does NOT no-op (auditor's 'uncertain/may no-op' concern disproven). Residual approximation: the tax is hardcoded to 2 life, so the {W} half of the {W/P} cost is never offered (a white attacker is forced to lose life instead of paying {W}), and planeswalker protection isn't separately modeled.

cards.name: Omnath, Locus of Rage
issues: deal_damage target_type is ['creature','player'] but oracle says 'any target', which also includes planeswalkers — planeswalker targeting is omitted. Landfall token and the dies-trigger (including Omnath itself, no exclude_self) are otherwise correct.

cards.name: Opportunistic Dragon
issues: 'it can't attack or block' is not modeled (cheat sheet §5 confirms this style of block restriction is unmodeled), so you can attack/block with the stolen permanent. Flying, gain_control while_source, lose_abilities, and the Human/artifact opponent target filter are correct.

cards.name: Orthion, Hero of Lavabrink
issues: "Activate only as a sorcery" timing restriction not encoded (activated_abilities support a timing field; none set on either ability)
"another target creature" self-exclusion not encoded on the copy_permanent target_filter, so it could target Orthion itself

cards.name: Otepec Huntmaster
issues: Activated haste ability targets target_type 'creature' with no Dinosaur restriction; oracle says "Target Dinosaur"

cards.name: Oyobi, Who Split the Heavens
issues: Trigger filter is type_line 'Spirit' only; Arcane spells ("a Spirit or Arcane spell") do not satisfy the subtype filter and won't trigger the token

cards.name: Painful Truths
issues: Converge unsupported by engine (no colors-of-mana-spent count); X hardcoded to draw 3 / lose 3, so casting with fewer than 3 colors over-draws and over-loses

cards.name: Parapet Thrasher
issues: "choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn" mode-exclusion rider not enforced (choose_one has no not-chosen-this-turn gate)
Mode 2 deals to 'each_opponent' but oracle is "each OTHER opponent" (should exclude the damaged opponent)
Mode 1 destroys an artifact of any opponent (controller:'opponent') rather than specifically "that opponent" who was damaged

cards.name: Path of Ancestry
issues: Mana produced is color 'any', not restricted to commander's color identity (add_mana color:'commander' is the modeled path)
The scry-1 rider (when that mana pays for a creature spell sharing a type with your commander) is not implemented

cards.name: Path to Exile
issues: Missing the controller_searches_basic_land compensation: "Its controller may search their library for a basic land, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle" (exile supports a controller_searches_basic_land flag)

cards.name: Patriarch's Bidding
issues: Each player returns only their own $chosen type; oracle returns creatures of ANY type chosen this way (all players' chosen types) from each player's graveyard — the tribal-mirror interaction is not captured

cards.name: Peek
issues: "Look at target player's hand" is not implemented; only the card draw is present (information clause missing)

cards.name: Phyrexian Atlas
issues: Corrupted is a per-opponent check ('each opponent who has three or more poison loses 1 life') but is modeled as one global gate: opponent_poison_counters resolves to the MAX poison among opponents, so if any single opponent has 3+, lose_life each_opponent drains ALL opponents (even those with <3); correct only in 1v1

cards.name: Planar Outburst
issues: Awaken 4—{5}{W}{W}{W} alternative-cost mode (four +1/+1 counters on a target land making it a 0/0 haste Elemental) is not implemented; the engine has no alternative-cost mechanism for this

cards.name: Ponder
issues: Approximated with scry 3: scry lets you bottom cards, but Ponder only reorders the top three (cannot bottom); the 'you may shuffle' option is not implemented

cards.name: Prosper, Tome-Bound
issues: Deathtouch, end-step impulse (count 1, correctly modeling 'until end of your next turn'), and Pact Boon Treasure are implemented; but Pact Boon uses cast_from_exile, which fires only for spells cast from exile. Lands played from exile (which Prosper regularly exiles) create no Treasure, and no land-played-from-exile watcher event exists.

cards.name: Raging Regisaur
issues: target_filter types are [creature, player] but 'any target' should also allow planeswalker (present in the target enum); a planeswalker cannot be chosen.

cards.name: Rakdos Carnarium
issues: Uses bounce_up_to (count 1), a declinable parked pick, but the oracle 'return a land you control to its owner's hand' is mandatory, so the Karoo drawback can be skipped. ('land' is not a target type, so bounce_up_to is the only land-targeting path available — the gap is unavoidable but real.)

cards.name: Ranging Raptors
issues: Oracle says 'you may search'; script performs the search unconditionally (no `may` wrapper). Rarely matters since the search is pure upside.

cards.name: Reclamation Sage
issues: Oracle is 'you may destroy target artifact or enchantment'; script uses mandatory `destroy` (no optional may / declinable target — `destroy_up_to` would model it). Forces destruction when the only legal target is your own permanent.

cards.name: Reconnaissance Mission
issues: Oracle draw is optional ('you may draw a card'); script draws unconditionally, removing the ability to decline (e.g., to avoid decking). Rarely relevant.

cards.name: Reflecting Pool
issues: add_mana color 'any' produces any color of mana unconditionally, ignoring the restriction to 'any type that a land you control could produce' — over-permissive, and the schema has no restriction option that models 'what your lands actually make'.

cards.name: Regal Behemoth
issues: monarch_land_bonus is a documented approximation (vocab §5): it adds the color of mana just produced rather than 'one mana of any color' the controller chooses. Minor divergence when tapping mono-color lands for off-color needs.

cards.name: Reliquary Tower
issues: 'You have no maximum hand size' has no engine flag and is unmodellable, so the clause is simply absent; the mana ability is correct. Impact is conditional on whether the engine enforces a cleanup discard (no evidence in the vocab that it does), so this is likely inert rather than harmful.

cards.name: Remorseful Cleric
issues: exile_graveyard targets one opponent's graveyard; oracle is 'target player's' graveyard (any player), so you cannot exile your own graveyard — minor edge case.

cards.name: Retreat to Kazandu
issues: Oracle counter mode targets any creature; script forces target_controller 'you', so you can't put the counter on an opponent's creature — negligible edge case.

cards.name: Return to Dust
issues: The 'if you cast this during your main phase' gate for the second target is not enforced (no phase gate exists); script always allows 2 targets, so the restriction is dropped — strictly more permissive than the card.

cards.name: Rise from the Grave
issues: Reanimation core works, but 'That creature is a black Zombie in addition to its other colors and types' has no color/type-addition primitive and is not implemented — matters only for tribal/color synergies.

cards.name: Ruthless Lawbringer
issues: Core works: ETB may (gated by condition creatures_you_control at_least 2), then sacrifice + destroy a nonland permanent.
sacrifice has no filter excluding self, so it may allow sacrificing Lawbringer itself rather than 'another creature' as printed.
The reflexive 'when you do, destroy target nonland permanent' is mandatory once you've sacrificed, but destroy_up_to is declinable — the player could sacrifice and then decline the destroy.

cards.name: Sandstone Oracle
issues: Flying + draw equal to opponent_hand_excess implemented; the 'choose an opponent' nuance in multiplayer is approximated by the count helper but plays correctly in the typical single-opponent case.

cards.name: Sarkhan, Soul Aflame
issues: become_copy 'except' grants keyword 'haste' that the oracle does not add — schema confirms except.keywords is honored, so this is an active buff, not inert.

Oracle's 'except its name is Sarkhan, Soul Aflame and it's legendary' is not modeled (become_copy has no name/type override) — the copy takes the Dragon's name, which can trigger a legend-rule conflict when copying a legendary Dragon you control.

cards.name: Savage Stomp
issues: Missing the '{2} less if it targets a Dinosaur you control' cost reduction — no cost_reduction is encoded (and cost_reduction.if only reads board-state counts, not target properties, so this discount is effectively unmodellable but is nonetheless absent).

cards.name: Scaretiller
issues: Mode 1 uses put_from_hand, which has no 'tapped' param (confirmed in schema), so the land enters untapped instead of 'onto the battlefield tapped' as the oracle requires (mode 2 correctly sets tapped:true).

cards.name: Scavenger Grounds
issues: Cost uses sacrifice_self, restricting to sacrificing Scavenger Grounds itself; oracle allows sacrificing any Desert you control (no by-type land sacrifice cost exists in the engine, so the broader option can't be expressed).

cards.name: Secluded Courtyard
issues: Any-color mana restriction only covers casting a creature spell of the chosen type (spell_type_line:'$chosen'); the oracle's second allowed use — 'activate an ability of a creature source of the chosen type' — is not encoded even though add_mana.restriction supports ability_source_type_line, making the mana more restrictive than the card.

cards.name: Selesnya Sanctuary
issues: bounce_up_to makes the land return declinable; the oracle bounce ('return a land you control') is mandatory (Karoo drawback) when you control a land, and you always control at least the Sanctuary itself.

cards.name: Servo Exhibition
issues: Creates 'Myr Token' instead of a Servo token; stats match (1/1 colorless artifact creature) but creature type is wrong, mattering for Servo/tribal synergies.

cards.name: Shacklegeist
issues: Flying and the tap-two-Spirits tapper are correct, but 'can block only creatures with flying' is not modeled (engine has no block restriction), slightly over-empowering the card's blocking.

cards.name: Sharuum the Hegemon
issues: Flying and the ETB artifact reanimation are correct, but the ability is 'you may' while the script runs return_from_graveyard unconditionally with no may/optional gate.

cards.name: Shivan Dragon
issues: Firebreathing pump uses target_type creature + target_controller you rather than self-only, so the +1/+0 can be redirected to any creature you control — a broader target scope than the card allows (minor benefit deviation).

cards.name: Spectral Sailor
issues: Missing Flash — flash is outside the engine's honored keyword set (grant_keyword enum excludes it and keywords[] entries outside the list are inert), so the creature cannot be cast at instant speed. Engine limitation, low impact.

cards.name: Steel Hellkite
issues: Niet beoordeeld: de audit-agent liet deze kaart weg uit zijn antwoord.

cards.name: Stormshriek Feral
issues: Firebreathing {1}{R} scripted as pump target_type:creature/target_controller:you — over-broad vs oracle 'This creature gets +1/+0' (self only); it can pump any creature you control.

Omen half 'Flush Out' is approximated as a from-hand activated ability (source_zone_required:hand) rather than a castable spell; roughly functional but not a real spell (no cast interaction, doesn't shuffle as part of resolution semantics).
'If you do, draw two cards' is not gated on the discard succeeding — discard(1) and draw(2) run unconditionally with no conditional wrapper.

cards.name: Stormshriek Feral // Flush Out
issues: Firebreathing {1}{R} scripted as pump target_type:creature/target_controller:you — over-broad vs 'This creature gets +1/+0' (self only).
Flush Out half approximated as a from-hand activated ability rather than a castable spell.
'If you do, draw two cards' not gated on discard succeeding — discard then draw run unconditionally.

cards.name: Sulfurous Springs
issues: 'This land deals 1 damage to you' is modeled as a pay_life 1 cost. This is the engine's only available approximation (no self-damage in mana abilities), but damage and life loss differ semantically — damage can be prevented/redirected and triggers damage-based effects.

cards.name: Sunfrill Imitator
issues: become_copy target_filter lacks exclude_self, so 'another target Dinosaur' isn't enforced (it could target itself).
The 'except its name is Sunfrill Imitator and it has this ability' rider is not modeled; the copy loses the attack-copy ability, so it can't re-copy on future attacks.

cards.name: Supernatural Stamina
issues: The '+2/+0 until end of turn' pump is missing — the script only grants the dies-effect, not the buff.

cards.name: Swords to Plowshares
issues: Missing the 'its controller gains life equal to its power' rider — exile fires but the lifegain drawback (exile.then gain_life with power_of target, recipient target_controller) is not implemented

cards.name: Sylvan Advocate
issues: pump only affects 'source' — the 'and land creatures you control get +2/+2' portion of the anthem is not implemented

cards.name: Syphon Mind
issues: discard uses random:true, but oracle lets each player choose which card to discard (documented approximation)
draw amount is fixed to num_opponents rather than the actual number of cards discarded — over-draws when an opponent has an empty hand

cards.name: Tainted Field
issues: The W and B mana abilities have no activation condition ({count/type_line Swamp, at_least 1}) — the 'Activate only if you control a Swamp' gate is unenforced

cards.name: Tainted Peak
issues: The B and R mana abilities have no activation condition — the 'Activate only if you control a Swamp' gate is unenforced

cards.name: Tainted Wood
issues: The B and G mana abilities have no activation condition — the 'Activate only if you control a Swamp' gate is unenforced

cards.name: Talisman of Creativity
issues: The 'deals 1 damage to you' clause is approximated as a pay_life cost rather than a deal_damage effect (differs re: damage prevention, lifelink, and dealt-damage triggers; also gates activation as a cost)

cards.name: Talisman of Curiosity
issues: The 'deals 1 damage to you' clause is approximated as a pay_life cost rather than a deal_damage effect (differs re: damage prevention and dealt-damage triggers)

cards.name: Talisman of Hierarchy
issues: deal_damage uses field 'target':'controller' instead of 'recipient':'controller'; 'controller' is not a valid target_type and 'target' is not a recognized field, so the 1 damage no-ops (drawback silently unenforced)

cards.name: Talisman of Impulse
issues: The 'deals 1 damage to you' clause is approximated as a pay_life cost rather than a deal_damage effect (differs re: damage prevention and dealt-damage triggers)

cards.name: Talisman of Progress
issues: The W and U abilities omit 'This artifact deals 1 damage to you' entirely — no pay_life and no deal_damage; the drawback is missing

cards.name: Talisman of Resilience
issues: The 'deals 1 damage to you' clause is approximated as a pay_life cost rather than a deal_damage effect (differs re: damage prevention and dealt-damage triggers)

cards.name: Taurean Mauler
issues: Changeling (is every creature type) is not implemented — no keyword support and no type-grant mechanism, so it won't count as any tribe for type-matters effects. The +1/+1 counter trigger itself is scripted correctly.

cards.name: Temple of the Dragon Queen
issues: Mana ability produces color 'any' rather than a single color chosen as the land enters; strictly more permissive (effectively rainbow) than the oracle's locked chosen color, though rarely impactful. The enters-tapped-unless-Dragon gate is modeled correctly.

cards.name: Thought Vessel
issues: Static 'You have no maximum hand size' not implemented (no engine support); mana ability is correct

cards.name: Thriving Bluff
issues: 'As it enters, choose a color other than red' not modeled; second mana ability adds 'any' color instead of the single pre-chosen color (strictly more permissive) — no engine mechanism exists to store/reference a chosen land color

cards.name: Thriving Grove
issues: 'choose a color other than green' not modeled; second mana ability adds 'any' color instead of the pre-chosen color (strictly more permissive) — no engine mechanism to store a chosen land color

cards.name: Thriving Heath
issues: 'choose a color other than white' not modeled; second mana ability adds 'any' color instead of the pre-chosen color (strictly more permissive) — no engine mechanism to store a chosen land color

cards.name: Thunderherd Migration
issues: Additional cost 'reveal a Dinosaur card from your hand or pay {1}' not enforced; the ramp resolves for its base cost only

cards.name: Topiary Stomper
issues: 'can't attack or block unless you control seven or more lands' — only the attack half is enforced (cant_attack_unless); the engine has no cant_block_unless so the block restriction is unmodeled.

cards.name: Transguild Promenade
issues: ETB drawback missing: 'When this land enters, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}.' (enters_tapped is modeled, but the sacrifice-unless-pay clause is absent).

cards.name: Underground River
issues: 'This land deals 1 damage to you' is modeled as a pay_life cost (life loss), which differs from damage for prevention/redirection and damage-triggered effects; edge-case only.

cards.name: Vapor Snag
issues: 'Its controller loses 1 life' is not implemented — bounce supports a then:[lose_life] rider but the script omits it. Main bounce effect works; missing effect is only 1 life, hence low severity (auditor's medium was too harsh).

cards.name: Vengeful Ancestor
issues: Confirmed engine limitation: goad only enforces the 'can't attack the goader' half; the 'attacks each combat if able / must attack a player other than you' compulsion is not enforced (per vocab §4).
goad restricted to target_controller:opponent, but oracle 'goad target creature' allows any creature including your own; the restriction is avoidable (target_controller could be 'any').

cards.name: Venomous Brutalizer
issues: The optional 'you may pay {1}{G}. If you do, proliferate' gate is missing; proliferate fires unconditionally and for free on ETB. The engine supports may.cost (mechanically enforced per vocab §4), so this is a fixable deviation, not a limitation.

cards.name: Victim of Night
issues: exclude_type_line only excludes 'Vampire'; the non-Werewolf and non-Zombie restrictions are absent, so Werewolves and Zombies can be wrongly targeted for destruction.

cards.name: Wakening Sun's Avatar
issues: Confirmed: the 'if you cast it from your hand' intervening-if is not implemented (no cast-from-hand gate exists in the condition vocabulary, and top-level trigger conditions are unread per vocab §4). destroy_all fires on every ETB including reanimation/blink, not just hand-casts.

cards.name: Wayward Swordtooth
issues: cant_attack_unless enforces only the attack restriction; the 'can't block' half is not enforced (source confirms blocking is an unrestricted approximation).

Ascend is a permanent 'rest of the game' latch, but cant_attack_unless re-checks permanents_you_control>=10 each declaration, so the creature wrongly loses the ability to attack if the count later drops below 10.

cards.name: Whirlwing Stormbrood
issues: Flash keyword is absent (and unmodelable — flash is not in the engine's honored-keyword set nor grantable).
Static 'You may cast sorcery spells and Dragon spells as though they had flash' is unimplemented (no engine mechanism). Flying + the Omen counters/shuffle half are correctly encoded.

cards.name: Whirlwing Stormbrood // Dynamic Soar
issues: Flash keyword is absent (oracle lists it; engine cannot model flash).
Static 'cast sorcery/Dragon spells as though they had flash' is unimplemented. Only flying and the +1/+1-counters-then-shuffle half are encoded (an acceptable approximation of the Omen).

cards.name: Wilhelt, the Rotcleaver
issues: create_token 'Zombie Token' does not appear to carry the 'decayed' downside, so the produced token is likely stronger than the intended 2/2 decayed Zombie (can block; no attack self-sacrifice).

The intervening 'if it didn't have decayed' is approximated by nontoken:true on the filter, which is over-restrictive: non-decayed token Zombies from other sources dying won't trigger (its own decayed tokens are correctly excluded). The end-step sacrifice/draw half is correctly modeled with an enforced may.condition.

cards.name: Will of the Temur
issues: Mode 1 copy_permanent adds 4/4 and flying but not the added 'Dragon creature' type (engine copy effects don't model added types; copying a noncreature won't become a creature).
Mode 2 'Target player draws' has no recipient/target and defaults to the controller, so it cannot direct the draw to another player as the oracle allows.

cards.name: Wirewood Lodge
issues: '{G},{T}: Untap target Elf' targets target_type:creature with no Elf restriction (untap has no positive type_line include filter), so it can untap any creature rather than only Elves.

cards.name: Yavimaya Coast
issues: The '1 damage to you' from the colored ability is modeled as a pay_life cost rather than damage dealt, losing the damage/prevention/lifelink distinction. This is the standard, accepted pain-land approximation (the engine cannot deal self-damage from a mana ability), so the deviation is minor.

cards.name: Zacama, Primal Calamity
issues: The ETB 'if you cast it' intervening condition is not gated (no cast-condition mechanism exists; top-level trigger conditions are dead fields), so Zacama untaps all lands even when it enters without being cast (reanimated/blinked).

cards.name: Golgari Charm
issues: Regeneration modeled as grant indestructible until end of turn — standard engine approximation; functionally equivalent for the destruction case.

cards.name: Harrow
issues: Sacrifice-a-land is an additional cast cost but modeled as a resolution action (only matters on the edge case of a countered spell); lands correctly enter untapped.

cards.name: Hellkite Courser
issues: Relies on put_from_command_zone to bundle the optional put + haste + return-at-next-end-step per engine semantics.

cards.name: Ionize
issues: Modeled via counter.controller_loses_life:2 rather than dealing 2 damage; this is the engine's standard approximation, gameplay-equivalent in nearly all cases

cards.name: Llanowar Wastes
issues: B/G abilities model 'deals 1 damage to you' as pay_life 1; near-identical gameplay (differs only under damage prevention/replacement)

cards.name: Promise of Bunrei
issues: Effect order is reversed vs oracle (create four tokens, then sacrifice_source) but sacrifice_source always succeeds so gameplay is identical; creature_died filter controller:you correctly fires on your creatures dying

cards.name: Propaganda
issues: attack_tax continuous effect with payload mana:2 affecting controller is the real engine mechanic (verified in data.ts / register_card_continuous_effects.sql), matching 'pay {2} for each attacking creature'

cards.name: Putrefy
issues: 'can't be regenerated' is not modeled but regeneration is not an engine mechanic, so no gameplay difference

cards.name: Quartzwood Crasher
issues: Uses the trample_combat_damage specialty event with set_pt event_amount to make the X/X token — the intended approximation of the trample-damage payoff

cards.name: Satyr Wayfinder
issues: mill-4-then-return-a-land-from-graveyard idiom is functionally equivalent to reveal-4/put-land-to-hand/rest-to-graveyard.

cards.name: Scourge of the Throne
issues: Flying, Dethrone (counter on most-life attack), and first-attack untap+extra-combat are all encoded; 'first time each turn' is gated by if_attacking_most_life.once_per_turn.

cards.name: Secrets of the Golden City
issues: Ascend approximated by checking permanents_you_control >= 10 at resolution (draw 2 + 1 = 3); equivalent for this one-shot sorcery.

cards.name: Seize the Spoils
issues: Additional-cost discard modeled as a resolution action rather than a cast-time cost; functionally equivalent for gameplay.

cards.name: Solemn Simulacrum
issues: ETB search and dies-draw are scripted as forced rather than 'you may'; both effects are essentially always beneficial so gameplay is identical in practice

cards.name: Spectral Procession
issues: Token stats (1/1 white Spirit with flying) live in the token registry; assuming 'Spirit Token' is defined correctly the script is faithful

cards.name: Spectral Shepherd
issues: Uses bounce_up_to (declinable) for a mandatory 'return target Spirit'; negligible since it targets your own Spirit

cards.name: Sphinx Summoner
issues: reveal:true not set (oracle says reveal it); public-info only, no gameplay impact
'may' optionality not encoded but search can naturally fail to find
